70010000115799.description:
From the hero and enemies to the blocks, BGM, and sound effects—
everything in this game is made from the developer (me): live-action images and real voice.
A sanity-questioning 2D action platformer has arrived.

[WARNING] The claimed clear rate is 0.000000000000000001%.
We take no responsibility for any regret after purchase.

■ "All-Me" materials, in full madness
The player, attacking enemies, and even the platforms are all live-action images of the developer.
Jump sounds, damage sounds, and the BGM are also made entirely from the developer's "voice."
Enjoy the deranged artwork that shaves away your sanity the longer you play.

■ Unreasonably "ultra-high difficulty"
Gotcha traps, nasty enemy placements, and strict control precision.
It follows the classic die-and-learn style of old-school "die games."
Even the developer struggles to clear it—can you endure it?

■ Friendship-destroying "2-player co-op"
Supports local 2-player co-op by sharing a controller.
But it's not normal co-op.
If either player makes a mistake: instant game over—collective responsibility.
Shove each other off tiny platforms, fall, blame your partner… pure chaos.

Now—don't give up. Overcome "me."
70010000115799.intro:
Dev-made live-action everything
Brutal die-and-retry (0.00…1% clear)
2-player co-op: one mistake = game over for both
70010000115799.name: All Me Action Game

70010000117760.description:
Inspired by classics, Wrack is an arcade-style FPS. Mow down enemies one after another, and become more powerful the more you kill. Amass a deadly arsenal, discover secret powers... and save your world!

In this remake of 2014's Wrack, play as Kain as you shoot, slash, and hyperblast your way through a horde of invading aliens and robots to keep your planet safe.

KEY FEATURES: 
- Kill Streaks: Rack up kill after kill to earn a kill streak! The more damage you pump into an enemy, the more extreme its death, and the more time you have to keep your streak going.
- Resets: Kill enemies a second time by exploding their corpse into giblets to reset your timer! Use your current weapon(s), or your melee attack to slice a corpse to bits.
- Fast Movement: Use your fast movement speed and abilities, like a super jump, to evade enemy attacks, and find secrets and treasure!
- Bosses: When you're done racking up a huge kill streak, duke it out with minibosses and bosses... and put your skills to the test!
70010000117760.intro: You are the only one stopping an alien invasion... and loving every second of it!
70010000117760.name: Wrack: Reclamation

70010000116085.description:
Get your brain ready and sharpen your curiosity in Do You Really Know?, a charming quiz game where every correct answer is a step toward the top of the Owls’ Tower of Knowledge. It starts easy, but don’t be fooled. The higher you climb, the tougher the questions become.

With each streak of correct answers, you advance through the tower’s floors and earn points to exchange for helpful power-ups. They give you that extra push when challenges get tricky and can make all the difference at critical moments. Made a mistake? No problem. You return to the preparation area, take a breath, and try again, now a little wiser.

With cute visuals, a relaxed atmosphere, and questions that test general knowledge without pressure, Do You Really Know? is perfect for players who enjoy smart quizzes, quick sessions, and the satisfying feeling of learning while playing.
70010000116085.intro: Do You Really Know? Climb the Tower of Knowledge
70010000116085.name: Do You Really Know?

70010000116456.description:
Welcome to 1 CatLine, a brainteasing precision platformer where you must guide a daring and adventurous heroine through single-screen challenges, with 50 unique levels spanning a variety of colorful pixel art biomes.

Run and leap through increasingly complex stages, freezing time and shifting perspectives to maneuver your cat friend around the environment to push crates, activate switches or create improvised platforms using its long furry body! Are you clever enough to clear all the challenges?

• Traverse increasingly complex platforming stages.
• Use your feline companion to form improvised platforms and push objects.
• Freeze time mid-air and maneuver your cat buddy to avoid pitfalls.
• Activate switches in the correct order to toggle barriers.
• Enjoy 50 levels of brainteasing retro goodness.
70010000116456.intro: Master puzzling stages with the help of your 2D feline companion!
70010000116456.name: 1 CatLine

70010000081852.description:
Embark on a tranquil journey to uncharted waters in Collector’s Cove, a farming adventure set on the high seas! There are no enemies in this world: it’s just you, your animal friend, and an ocean full of secrets and surprises.

Grow a flourishing floating farm. Cultivate rare crops and reel in elusive fish. Discover new islands and climate zones, each with its own collection of unique local flora. Fill in your Collector’s Compendium. Craft items and personalize your ship, transforming it into your own home. Learn how to gather enough rare crops and fish; you might even rise to the ultimate rank: Named-Collector!

Best of all, you don’t journey alone. Your animal friend will come along for the ride! Strengthen your bond, customize her with accessories, unlock new interactions, and grow together as you venture onwards!

Features:

Farm: Cultivate your own farm on the deck of a ship, surrounded by the open sea!

Discover: Sail across uncharted waters and forage on unseen islands!

Collect: Find rare crops and fish on your quest to fill in every page of the Collector’s Compendium!

Befriend: Forge a bond and customize your trusty animal friend who can lend a fin whenever needed!

Personalize: Craft useful items from foraged materials and transform your boat into your own home!
70010000081852.name: Collector's Cove

70010000097340.description:
Step into the life of a self-proclaimed detective. Along with your quirky assistant Olivina, take on a seemingly ordinary case, until you unravel its hidden twists and turns that pull you through a thrilling, unique story. 

Game Features:

• Unique investigation gameplay that challenges players to be observant 
• Diverse cast of characters 
• Smooth 2D animation that breathes life into the characters
• Stylized, hand-drawn CG for players to unlock and collect
70010000097340.intro: Embark on a thrilling detective visual novel with your quirky assistant, Olivina, featuring unique investigations and a diverse cast of characters.
70010000097340.name: Memory Rewind

70010000098355.description:
From the creators of Teacup, Bubblegum Galaxy is a cozy narrative building game about rebuilding the galaxy by designing planets. Relax as you create colorful planets or spend hours trying to get a perfect score!

BECOME A PLANET ARCHITECT
Your small but trusty computer will allow you to design planets by placing tiles. To create efficient planets, the software will suggest missions such as connecting similarly colored tiles or a specific number of trees. Each planet has its own quirks and special rules you will have to master to do your best work yet!

BEFRIEND YOUR CO-WORKERS
In-between planet designing sessions, you'll be free to roam the office, inspect your surroundings and chat with your co-workers. Encounter hundreds of unique story events as you get to know this quirky cast of characters.

DISCOVER WHO DELETED THE GALAXY
The day you started your internship the inter-dimensional universe server crashed for "unknown reasons", deleting the entirety of the Bubblegum galaxy. If you prove your skill as a planet architect you just might find out the truth behind why the galaxy was deleted...
70010000098355.name: Bubblegum Galaxy

70010000099765.description:
Zumba – Galactic Marble Blast propels you into a vibrant sci-fi universe where you, a brave spacefrog, must fend off waves of rolling marbles—and occasionally rogue planets—before they vanish into the void. Select a star system, position your frog-powered cannon at the screen’s center, and launch colorful marbles or planets along winding orbital paths. Match three or more identical spheres to trigger spectacular explosions, pause the advance, and rack up combos for massive scores.
Earn up to three stars on each level by clearing all spheres before they cross the event horizon. Every ten levels, you warp into a new galaxy with unique challenges: the glowing Nebula Gardens, the rocky Asteroid Belts, the swirling Quantum Vortex, and the perilous Black Hole Citadel. Each galaxy introduces new marble colors, curved gravitational paths, floating obstacles, and ever-increasing speeds—keeping the cosmic challenge fresh and exhilarating.
70010000099765.intro: Leap across the cosmos—match, blast, and save the galaxy in marble style!
70010000099765.name: Zumba - Galactic Marble Blast

70010000104927.description:
This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. 
There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed. 
You can also change the drone's flight mode from Normal, Sport, and Eco to any of the 3. 

Enjoy the beautiful scenery of Daedunsan, Korea with "Real" footage! 
There are a total of 3 flight courses in 2 areas.
 high-definition footage faithfully reproduces the atmosphere of real nature, providing a strong sense of immersion in the game. 
Smooth and realistic video playback makes you feel like you are a real drone pilot. 
Large capacity! You can fly to locations that show the beautiful scenery of Korea! 
Two play modes are supported: course-specific flying mode and view mode automatic flight. There is also an achievement system. 
Visit Korea from home at any time! 
Enjoy the drone flight control experience and the beautiful natural scenery. MasCon for Nintendo Switch™ made by Zuiki of Japan is also supported.
70010000104927.name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Daedunsan

70010000106508.description:
EVOLVE YOUR BEASTS!
Bean Beasts gain experience, evolve and unlock additional attacks. 
• 
USE POWERFUL ABILITIES!
Each Beast comes with a unique special ability and secondary attack.
• 
UPGRADE YOUR TRAPS!
Choose the path to best suit your strategy.
• 
RE-PATH YOUR FOES!
Use walls to redirect enemies however you see fit. 
• 
Game Features:
- 10 unique Bean Beasts, each with 3 evolution stages. 
- 12 unique Traps, each with 2 upgrade paths. 
- 21 individual player-triggered abilities, including 5 summons. 
- 40 hand-crafted levels spanning 5 biomes. 
- 8 epic boss encounters. 
- Plus 8 endless mode maps. 
- A new Beast, Trap or Upgrade unlocked after every level. 
- 4 difficulty options - from beginner to beast mode. 
- Over 50 different enemies to challenge your tactical skills. 
- 2 damage types, 5 damage elements and 7 status effects. 
- Use of physics and gravity to shove your opponents. 
- Custom music, artwork and juicy sound effects.
70010000106508.intro: Defeat monster hordes alongside your Bean Beasts in this cute, challenging Tower Defense Game! Evolve your companions, explore upgrade paths for traps and take on epic boss battles!
70010000106508.name: Bean Beasts

70010000106677.description:
Turn numbers into works of art! 
Choose from over 120 designs, color in each section, and marvel as vibrant images appear before your very eyes. Whether animals, landscapes or artistic designs, experience the perfect escape as you paint. 

• Draw intuitively with your finger – control all your actions directly via the touchscreen, with no additional devices required

• Suitable for any talent level – a range of difficulty levels are available from the first brushstroke to the finished masterpiece 

• Personalize your work – experiment with 8 color palettes and 8 unique painting styles to produce wildly different results 
 
• Smart drawing aids – highlight fields, show/hide numbers, or automatically jump to the next area  

• Flexible painting – you can start a picture, take a break and then resume painting whenever you feel like it 

• Admire your gallery – use time-lapse mode to look back at how your artworks were created
70010000106677.name: CreArt – Painting by Numbers

70010000107464.description:
Welcome to the Ultimate Parkour Game!

Welcome to Parkour Labs, a vaporwave-inspired parkour game.
Surf the waves of nostalgia and retro aesthetics, sliding down ramps and performing smooth turns.
Explore colorful and surreal landscapes inspired by the culture, music, and art of the 80s and 90s.
Collect glitch effects and artifacts to unlock new levels and secrets.
Experience the synthwave atmosphere in this unique and original game that challenges your mouse control and movement skills.
70010000107464.intro: Think you're a parkour master? Prove it!
70010000107464.name: Parkour Labs

70010000110359.description:
In the floating world of beauty and illusion, love is the most dangerous secret of all.
You arrive as a stranger… but soon, one glance, one whispered word, changes everything.

Each geisha hides a story  of duty, desire, and dreams long buried beneath layers of silk and silence.
As you grow closer, your choices will shape a fragile bond that could either blossom into forbidden love… or fade like cherry petals in the wind.

Will you be the one to free her heart… or let her disappear into the shadows of tradition?

How far would you go for love that was never meant to be?


Game Features:

● Romance among the blossoms: Fall for captivating geishas, each with her own past, secrets, and emotions waiting to unfold.

● Your choices decide her fate: Comfort her, challenge her, or confess your feelings. Every decision changes your shared destiny.

● A poetic journey through the floating world: Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of beauty, melancholy, and passion.

● Multiple endings: Discover the bittersweet paths of love, freedom, and sacrifice.

● A visual novel of emotion and elegance: Where every word, glance, and gesture can change the course of a heart.


Will you risk everything to love a geisha who can never be yours?
70010000110359.intro: A geisha’s heart longs for freedom… will you be the one to set it free?
70010000110359.name: Geisha's Heart: Romance Among the Cherry Blossoms

70010000113719.description: The veggies have snapped! Blast through endless waves of enraged carrots, onions, and mutant tomatoes in this fast-paced rogue-like FPS. Collect upgrades, unlock new arenas, and survive the Feast of Fury — where dinner fights back!
70010000113719.intro: Enter the warzone against furious killer vegetables!
70010000113719.name: Veggie Warfare – Feast of Fury

70010000114123.description:
The Hidden Cats are back to explore the whispers and shadows of the mysterious Spooky Village!

Find over 1200 hidden objects across 12 levels, collect special cards, and discover real-life cats shared by our Hidden Cats community!

Game Features:
- 1200+ hidden objects, 12 unique levels with unlockables
- Collectible cards, achievements, secrets to discover
- Hand-drawn art & original soundtrack with dynamic sound effects
70010000114123.intro: Seek the whiskers in the dark... Find the cats in the Spooky Village!
70010000114123.name: Hidden Cats in Spooky Village

70010000114257.description:
Step into the chaotic world of Ultra Bonk Survivors, where every swing, spell, and explosion decides your fate!

Choose your hero, dive into monster-filled arenas, and unleash devastating attacks in this fast-paced survivor-style action roguelite designed for quick, addictive sessions of pure fun.

Game features:
- Bonk, Slash, and Survive!
- Face endless waves of goblins, skeletons, and demons in vibrant fantasy arenas that crumble and glow with magical energy.
- Every run is a fight to last just a little longer—and bonk a little harder.
- Unlock Heroes & Legends
- Begin your adventure with humble warriors and unlock mighty heroes as you progress, including the legendary Lion Knight, masters of sword and shield.
- Each character brings unique stats and attack styles to discover.
- Grow Stronger Every Run
- Collect glowing orbs, relics, and mystical books that grant random power-ups. Experiment with different builds and create unstoppable synergies.
- Explore and Interact
- Find shrines, treasure chests, and mysterious power-ups scattered across the battlefield.
  
Will you risk everything to open a chest in the middle of a horde?
One More Bonk...
Fast-paced, endlessly replayable, and dangerously addictive. Every defeat brings you closer to your next unlock and new surprises.

Check out this fun new game from the NOSTRA.GAMES team.

Ultra Bonk Survivors is your ticket to the ultimate fantasy survival experience.

Choose your hero, charge into the temple ruins, and see how long you can survive the bonkocalypse.
70010000114257.intro: Epic fantasy survival – bonk your way to Glory!
70010000114257.name: Ultra Bonk Survivors

70010000115504.description:
An evil Necromancer has brought ruin upon an already dangerous island.

It's up to Rynna to fight her way through hordes of monsters and undead beings, and defeat the Necromancer and his minions and free the souls of those who have been trapped in the world of the living.

Find Weapons and Artifacts, explore the 20 zones, each dividing into multiple caves and dungeons. Help the people by finding their possessions and freeing their souls.


Shalnor: Silverwind saga 2 mixes 2D sprites with a 3D terrain, giving it a unique look, the game features quick and swift movement that makes fighting hordes of monsters fun.

Featuring 15 unique Items/Weapons that accommodates different playstyles and adds a lot of variation to combat.
70010000115504.intro: An epic RPG/Action Adventure game. With focus on gauntlet-style combat, traps, boss fights and beautiful pixel-art scenery.
70010000115504.name: Shalnor: Silverwind Saga 2

70010000115528.description:
Get ready for intergalactic barking and clever strategy in Collie Call: The Future Is Calling. Here, you control a robotic dog in outer space on a very unusual mission: organise floating sheep into air-bubble pastures before chaos takes over the galaxy.

Each stage is a smart puzzle where every push matters. Teleporters flash, buttons activate futuristic gates, and every move can mean the difference between a perfect solution or a sheep stuck in the wrong corner of the universe. Plan carefully, test routes, use undo without fear, and refine your strategy until everything clicks into place.

With 30 levels full of progressive challenges, charming sci-fi visuals, and accessible mechanics, Collie Call blends logic, cuteness, and technology into an engaging experience. It is the perfect puzzle for players who enjoy thinking calmly, experimenting with creative solutions, and celebrating that satisfying feeling of getting everything just right.

The future is calling. And it needs a good dog.
70010000115528.intro: Collie Call: Sheep Mission in Space
70010000115528.name: Collie Call: The Future Is Calling

70010000116578.description:
Welcome to an exclusive spa where relaxation comes with chemistry.

In Spa Massage Boys: Love & Relax, you’ll meet confident, charming guys ready to unwind with you. Enjoy satisfying massage-themed minigames while building attraction through playful conversations and bold choices.

Each guy has his own vibe, from confident and teasing to calm and mysterious. Learn what makes them relax, discover their reactions, and unlock special moments as you progress.

Keep your focus, read the mood, and let the connection grow.


FEATURES:

● Massage-based minigames focused on timing and precision.

● Flirty, choice-driven conversations.

● Unlockable images and exclusive scenes.

● Different personalities and story routes.

● Multiple endings depending on your performance and decisions.


Can you handle the heat behind closed doors?

Step into the spa, take a deep breath… and see where the tension leads.

Are you ready?
70010000116578.intro:
Strong hands. 
Playful tension. 
Total relaxation.
70010000116578.name: Spa Massage Boys: Love & Relax

70010000117590.description:
Schoolgirl Card Pull Simulator is a fast, feel-good draw simulator built around one satisfying loop:
Earn → Draw → Duplicate → Sell → Draw More.

No money? Head to a part-time job.
Saved up? Time to draw.
Got duplicates? Talk to the clerk, sell them, and go again.

But it’s not just endless drawing.
Sell prices change at random, so deciding whether to sell now or wait for the next day can make a big difference to your budget.
Play smart and you’ll unlock 10-pulls for a faster pace—and if you push further, you’ll reach the Ultimate Draw, where your chance of pulling an SSR increases the more you use it.
SSRs are rare, so when one finally appears, the payoff is huge.

Outside of the part-time jobs and the draw screen, the game is presented in 3D.
Display your cards in a showroom case, chat with the clerk, and enjoy the growing satisfaction of building a real collection.

The goal is simple:
Complete all 50 illustrated schoolgirl cards and fill the showcase.
Run out of money…? Then it’s back to work.

Highlights

All-in on draw excitement: Flashy animations make big pulls feel great

Rarities: N / R / SR / SSR (SSR is extremely rare—so it feels special)

Two “it’s coming” tells: Telltale animations you can spot instantly

Random market shifts: Sell values change by day—timing becomes your strategy

Duplicates become assets: Sell individual cards and reinvest to increase your draw count

3 part-time job mini-games: Dishwashing / Construction site / Card sorting

3D shop for display & conversation: Arrange cards in a showcase and collect in style

Made to be completed: 50 cards total, no additional cards planned (complete buy-to-play experience)

Progression

Collect enough cards to unlock 10-pulls (the 10th card has a higher SSR chance)

Collect more to unlock the Ultimate Draw (SSR chance increases the more you use it)

Example: 5th 10-pull = SSR 40% / 7th = 50% / 10th = 90%

Daily SSR rotation: Available SSRs change each day, updated in sets of five

Want a different SSR? Use the Change Date button to reroll the lineup
70010000117590.intro:
Work, draw, sell, draw again.
Until you complete the Schoolgirl Card Collection, your money management is a roguelike.
70010000117590.name: Schoolgirl Card Pull Simulator

70010000117754.description:
Quick Brain: Number Hunt is a brain-training game where you search for the target number hidden among a screen full of colorful digits.

The rule is simple: find the specified number—that’s it!
Ignore distracting sizes, colors, and layouts, and rely on your focus and observation skills to lock onto the correct answer.

With timed stages, your quick thinking and speed are put to the test.
Includes 150 stages. Quick to pick up, satisfying to clear—perfect for short breaks, and surprisingly addictive even after a long day.
70010000117754.intro: The answer is hiding in the numbers!
70010000117754.name: Quick Brain: Number Hunt

70010000117778.description:
Quick Brain Letter Hunt is a simple, satisfying brain-teaser:
Just spot the target character hidden among a screen full of scattered letters and tap it.

You’ll encounter Hiragana, the English alphabet, Hangul, and Traditional Chinese characters.
The more unfamiliar characters mix in, the more your focus and observation skills get tested!

Quick to play in short bursts, yet perfectly warming for the brain.
Ignore distractions like shape, size, color, and placement—trust your eagle eyes and claim the correct answer.
70010000117778.intro:
Find the ONE specified character!
Search across Hiragana, English letters, Hangul, and Traditional Chinese!
70010000117778.name: Quick Brain Letter Hunt

70010000117923.description:
The Story:

Long ago, the kingdom thrived—ringed by vast forests, towering mountains, and tranquil seas. From its high walls, the great castle watched over a peaceful people… until the night Death rode through the gates on a black horse.

It passed silently through the streets, and ruin followed in its wake. Fire spread, plague consumed the weak, and despair swallowed the living. By dawn, the cries had faded, the streets were filled with the fallen, and a terrible curse had taken hold.

Since that day, the kingdom has lived under a broken pact. Every ten years, a chosen soul must descend into the darkness in the hope of ending the curse.

A secret council now prepares the ritual once more, forging a magical six-sided die—an artifact said to shape fate itself. The newly chosen knight rides toward the ten forbidden dungeons, where shadows cling to ancient stone… and deep within, the monsters wait.

The Game:

DecaDungeons™ is a first-person, turn-based dungeon crawler that blends classic DRPG mechanics with a minimalistic, atmospheric 3D pixel-art style.

Descend through ten deadly dungeons, battle powerful foes, and uncover the secrets needed to save the kingdom. Exploration is just as important as survival—hidden throughout the labyrinths are 50 Red Coins, waiting for those who search carefully.

Rare Monsters:

Some encounters carry a 1 in 100 chance to spawn a rare, rainbow-colored monster. These elusive foes grant massive rewards in EXP and gold. Few have seen them—will you be one of the lucky few?

Events:

While exploring, you’ll encounter special events—short scenarios that present three possible choices. Each decision carries risk or reward. Choose wisely… luck does not always favor the bold.

The Council Has Spoken:

The fate of the realm now rests in the hands of the dice-wielding knight.
Will you break the curse… or watch the kingdom fall into darkness?

Key Features:

10 unique, trap-filled dungeons

First-person, turn-based combat

50 hidden Red Coins to discover

Rare monsters with massive EXP and gold rewards

Random events with branching outcomes

Atmospheric 3D pixel-art environments
70010000117923.intro: DecaDungeons™ is a first-person, turn-based dungeon crawler where fate is decided by a magical six-sided dice. Explore 10 deadly dungeons, battle fierce foes, hunt monsters, and survive!
70010000117923.name: DecaDungeons™

70010000118847.description:
UFOPHILIA is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore areas marked by alien phenomena. Use specialized equipment to detect, identify, and photograph aliens, but do so at your own risk... They are watching you too.

Equipped with advanced tools, your mission is to detect, identify, and photograph extraterrestrials, each encounter involving unique behaviors and unpredictable dangers.

Each mission is different: spawn areas, alien types, and phenomena are constantly changing. Some aliens are hostile, others are curious or even playful, but they are all watching you. 

Features

- Atmospheric horror with unpredictable dynamic encounters.
- Nine alien types with distinct behaviors, reactions, and weaknesses.
- Specialized investigation tools, such as EMF detectors, night vision, and more.
- Real device synergies that enhance gameplay when tools are combined.
- Roswell point system to unlock upgrades, new tools, and missions.
- High replayability with random alien appearances and mission outcomes.
- Multiple endings and performance ranks, from “Forum Conspiracy Theorist” to “Roswell Agent".
70010000118847.intro: Not all visitors come in peace.
70010000118847.name: UFOPHILIA

70010000118959.description:
Do you believe in the existence of an afterlife?

■About
Jukai Maze is a sci-fi suspense visual novel where every choice sends the story down a completely different path. Branching routes twist and diverge with each decision you make. Explore multiple endings, piece together scattered clues, and uncover the deeper truth that lies beneath them all.

■Story
“They say there’s a research institute at the foot of Mount Fuji studying the afterlife.”
Intrigued by the half-believable rumor, Shiu invites the protagonist, Haryu Ryoushi, to explore the depths of Aokigahara. What was supposed to be a simple vlog shoot shifts the moment they step into the forest.
As night falls and the mist thickens, they lose their sense of direction. Shiu vanishes without a trace, and Ryoushi is pulled into another “reality,” awakening inside a strange psychiatric hospital.

Everyone inside mutters things that border on madness:
“This place is a dream.”
“This place is another planet.”
“This place is the afterlife.”

As the boundary between truth and illusion collapses, Ryoushi sinks deeper into the maze, and is soon entangled in a baffling murder case……

■Features
- Fully voiced in Japanese
- Clear, elegantly structured storytelling
- Expressive and nuanced character portraits
- Retro filters & pixel fonts included.
- Immersive HD Rumble integration.
70010000118959.intro: Beneath a volcano, a facility probes the afterlife. As the world ends, enter the spectral forest maze to find your missing loved one.
70010000118959.name: Jukai Maze

70010000118965.description:
Rooster Saga is a fast-paced arcade game focused on timing, reflexes, and precision.

Tap to keep the rooster airborne, avoid endless obstacles, and survive for as long as possible. Every mistake ends the run instantly.

Easy to learn but hard to master, Rooster Saga is built for quick sessions and constant retries, where skill is the only thing that matters.

Compete on global leaderboards, compare your scores with other players, and push yourself to fly farther with every attempt.

Whether you play for a minute or an hour, each run challenges your focus and reaction speed.

There are no upgrades, power-ups, or shortcuts. Success depends entirely on your timing and control.

Perfect for arcade fans, score chasers, and players who enjoy simple mechanics with a tough challenge.
70010000118965.intro:
One tap. 
One rooster. 
Endless challenge.
70010000118965.name: Rooster Saga: I Believe I Can Fly

70010000119015.description:
Perfect for when you’re thinking, “I want a quick dose of mystery!”
Each puzzle is a simple one-question, one-answer challenge.

You’ll face strange little moments hidden in everyday life—
odd details and puzzling events that make you tilt your head.

Read the story, sort out the situation, and reach the one true answer.

Controls are simple:
When you’ve got it, just tap the part you think is the answer.

That “Aha!” moment is addictive.
Use your observation and imagination to unravel every mystery!
70010000119015.intro:
One-minute spark, satisfying payoff!
A collection of bite-sized mysteries you can solve in no time.
70010000119015.name: Quick Deduction Short Mysteries

70010000119462.description:
Six Seven Nights is a compact first-person survival horror focused on investigation, atmosphere, and escalating tension.

You are sent to a school locals openly call cursed. It has been closed for months after a chain of unexplained incidents and growing panic in the surrounding area. Strange sightings, nightly disturbances, and psychological breakdowns are all tied to the building — or so people believe.

With fear spreading and pressure mounting, authorities decide on a simple solution: demolish the school. Your employer disagrees.

According to the Bureau, destroying the building won't end the phenomenon — it may make it far worse. You are sent in to prevent a disaster before it's too late.

The game unfolds across six playable nights. Each night:
• expands the accessible areas of the school
• introduces new paranormal behavior
• increases pressure and unpredictability

You explore a damaged, partially collapsed building, clearing debris, opening sealed rooms, and uncovering clues through environmental storytelling, notes, and strange markings scattered throughout the school. There is no combat — survival depends on observation, timing, and understanding how the environment responds to your actions.

A persistent hostile presence roams the school and reacts dynamically. Some actions draw attention. Others reduce it. Learning the difference is part of surviving.

Between nights, you receive calls from a Bureau specialist who helps contextualize what you're dealing with — offering guidance without direct answers. The truth is never handed to you.

You have six nights because the seventh day is irreversible.
If you fail, demolition won't erase what's here — it will unleash it.

Features:
• First-person survival horror with a unique combat system
• Six-night structure with escalating tension
• One evolving location that changes with progress
• Environmental puzzles inspired by classic horror
• A reactive entity that responds to player behavior
• Heavy focus on atmosphere, sound, and observation

The school is not just a location.
It's a problem that's running out of time.
70010000119462.intro: You have six nights. The seventh day changes everything.
70010000119462.name: Six Seven Nights

70010000119625.description:
This title is a real-time simulation game released by Nihon Falcom in 1991.

As the player, you become the king of a nation, governing your land with the ultimate goal of conquering all rival countries. You will issue commands to your units to cultivate land, build houses, construct defensive fences, and lay down bridges. While working to build a robust stronghold, you can merge units together to form a powerful army. Ultimately, capturing the enemy's castle clears the stage.

After completing a stage, statistics such as your occupation rate are displayed, encouraging replayability as you aim for higher scores.

The game features a total of 52 stages. Not only does the difficulty increase as you progress, but the visuals—including characters and themes—also change. This ensures the game never feels stale, allowing you to enjoy a fresh experience every time you play.
70010000119625.intro: Fortify your nation and conquer enemy castles in Falcom's masterpiece RTS. With 52 diverse stages and addictive gameplay centered on occupation rates.
70010000119625.name: EGGCONSOLE Advanced LORD MONARCH PC-9801

70010000120491.description:
Speed Boom: Last Delivery is a high-speed arcade experience built around one thing — momentum.

Dash across a vibrant neon city, wall-run between skyscrapers, chain jumps across rooftops, and deliver packages as fast as humanly possible. Every second counts. Every shortcut matters. Every mistake costs you time.

Take on 40 time-based deliveries and push for the ultimate S+ rank. The faster you move, the better the reward. Master the routes, optimize your path, and chase your personal best.

Earn coins through perfect runs and exploration. Upgrade your runner’s speed, acceleration, and movement to break your limits. Unlock a variety of skins and express your style while dominating the streets.

The city is fully explorable and packed with hidden graffiti waiting to be discovered. Find them, repaint them with your own mark, and turn the streets into your playground.

Designed for replayability and built with flow in mind, Speed Boom: Last Delivery is speedrun-friendly and rewards skill, precision, and mastery.

No brakes. No limits. Just speed.
70010000120491.intro:
FULL SPEED.
BEAT THE CLOCK.
DELIVER OR LOSE.
70010000120491.name: Speed Boom: Last Delivery

70050000066465.description:
"Celebrate your support of Collector's Cove with this exclusive Supporter Pack! 

It includes three unique cosmetic items:
- A crown for your animal companion
- A tiara for your animal companion
- A jester cap for your character

These cosmetics are designed to make your animal companion even more majestic, while you'll be able to bring a touch of humor to the court!

They are only available in this pack, as a special thank-you to players who are helping support Collector's Cove even further."
70050000066465.name: Collector's Cove Supporter Pack

70050000070140.description:
This set includes new dungeons, cards, a Muse, and a Random Event related to the Blaster Master Zero series.
Clear the first new dungeon and you'll be able to use the new cards and Muse, as well as trigger the Random Event, in other dungeons.
70050000070140.name: Card-en-Ciel DLC - The World of the "Blaster Master Zero Series"

70070000031789.description:
Two complete anime romance games. One charming collection.

This bundle brings together Cozy Earth: Hawaii Island Love Anime BOYS and K-pop Idols Dating: Anime Love for B.SeveT, offering two anime-inspired romance experiences focused on charm, personality, and emotional connection.

Meet expressive anime boys with distinct personalities. Some bring a calm and cozy presence, while others shine with idol-like charisma that draws attention from the very first encounter.

Each game invites you into a unique setting, from peaceful tropical islands to stylish pop culture scenes, where conversations and choices shape every interaction.

Progress through light visual novel gameplay, unlock new moments, and discover how each boy reacts as your connection grows stronger.

Attraction builds naturally over time, personalities unfold gradually, and each experience offers its own tone and rhythm.

Whether you enjoy cozy romance or glamorous anime dating, this bundle delivers hours of engaging anime love stories at a reduced price.

Two games.
Two styles of romance.
One bundle to enjoy.
70070000031789.intro:
Two anime romances.
One irresistible bundle.
Which boy will steal your heart?
70070000031789.name: Anime Romance Boys Collection: 2 Game Bundle

70070000032279.description:
The Supporter Edition is for those who want to support the developers of Collector's Cove even further!
Please know that we are incredibly grateful for your support. Thank you very much!

This edition includes the full game, two royal cosmetics for your animal companion – to give them an extra majestic look – and a matching jester cap to customize your character – perfect to keep their majesty entertained.
70070000032279.name: Collector's Cove Supporter Edition

70010000108111.description:
Build and manage your own geeky supermarket in Weeb Store Simulator: Supermarket Together, a fun and chaotic store management simulator where games, manga, and collectibles rule the shelves!

Start small with a humble shop and grow it into a bustling paradise for gamers and anime fans. Stock video games and consoles, organize manga and comics, display figurines and toys, and keep customers happy by quickly handling restocks and checkout rush hours.

Unlock new licenses, expand your store layout, take on special tasks, and optimize your workflow to boost profits. Play solo or team up with up to 4 players in online co-op, where teamwork, coordination, and a bit of chaos turn your shop into a thriving entertainment megastore.
70010000108111.intro: Build the ultimate nerd paradise! Sell games, manga, and toys, manage the rush, and work together with friends in chaotic co-op to turn a tiny shop into a weeb megastore.
70010000108111.name: Weeb Store Simulator: Supermarket Together

70010000116804.description:
Slime your way though this platforming adventure about a brave little slime in a vast magical kingdom.

The evil menace known as Lord Old Skull has been freed, and now our colorful family of slimes must heed the call of heroism. Customize your slime, journey through diverse biomes, battle powerful bosses, and discover alternative branching paths in this slime-sized action quest.

Choose your level of challenge while gaining items, building experience, and enjoying immersive retro graphics and sounds.


Features
* Platform action gameplay with alternate paths
* Customize your slime
* Explore 4 diverse biomes 
* Battle 4 epic bosses
* Gain items and experience
* Retro game visual and sound aesthetics
70010000116804.intro: This adventurous slime is ready to become a legendary hero
70010000116804.name: Adventurous Slime

70010000119689.description:
Experience the sun-drenched beauty of Southern Spain from the comfort of your home. Jigsaw Puzzle Passport: Spain invites you to a relaxing, visual journey, featuring breathtaking high-definition photography.

High-Definition Travel
Forget generic illustrations—immerse yourself in 15 hand-curated levels featuring real-world photography. 

Game Highlights:
>Authentic Scenery: 15 massive, high-resolution puzzles showcasing real locations in Southern Spain.
>Relaxing Atmosphere: No timers, no stress. Just you, the music, and the beautiful scenery.
>Intuitive Controls: Smooth "drag-and-drop" with seamless touchscreen mechanics designed for both casual players and puzzle enthusiasts.
>Save and Load system to track which levels you've already completed!
70010000119689.name: Jigsaw Puzzle Passport: Spain

70070000032389.description:
This edition of MLB The Show 26 includes: 
• MLB® The Show™ 26
• 20 The Show Packs
• 2 World Baseball Classic Choice Packs
• 1 Legend Choice Pack
• 1 World Baseball Classic Uniform Pack
• 1 Equipment Pack
• Double Daily Rewards
• 1 Cover Athlete Bat Skin Pack
• 20K Stubs™

Step up and take control of how you leave your mark in the most immersive MLB® The Show™ yet. 

Discover new Road To The Show mechanics, deeper Franchise experiences, enhanced customization options, and true-to-life on-field action.

Road To The Show
NEW – Road to Cooperstown & Expanded Amateur Years Career
Your journey to greatness starts here, which path will you choose?
Earn a coveted spot at the MLB Draft Combine® or catch the eye of one of 11 additional new colleges as you advance through chapters of your career.
Compete in the officially licensed Men’s NCAA® College World Series® as you rise from a promising high school talent to one of the all-time MLB® greats – immortalized in the National Baseball Hall of Fame and maybe even a place on the first ballot.

Diamond Dynasty¹
Unmissable Updates
Build your ultimate fantasy team with a new Red Diamond rarity tier and World Baseball Classic player cards featuring elite game-changing players.
Play revamped Mini-Seasons campaigns as you level up your stars with an upgraded PXP system, customize their skills with Parallel Mods, and hit Parallel V faster through special challenges.

Franchise 
NEW – Revamped Front Office Experience
Play the nail-biting key matches and moments of your Franchise GM career with streamlined seasons and Custom Game Entry. Track rumours and strike big deals in the ultimate all-in-one Trade HUB, where a new Trade Logic System delivers real depth, immersion, and high-stakes decision-making. Smarter lineups and improved player regression now mirror the real decisions and realities that shape your organization’s future.

Storyline¹
The Negro Leagues Season 4
The award-winning game mode returns with all-new legends, uniforms, and stadiums – celebrating the stories of some of the most important yet often forgotten ballplayers in history.

Gameplay Updates – More Control Than Ever
Bear Down Pitching: exert total control over your pitches by earning a limited supply of elite focus to deploy in the most critical moments.

Big Zone Hitting: rack up the home runs with more control over your swing placement, giving you a better chance to nail that sweet spot.

¹Internet connection required.
70070000032389.intro: Make your mark. Become a Legend. Own The Show™.
70070000032389.name: MLB® The Show™ 26 - Digital Deluxe Edition

70070000034090.description:
Pool Fever brings the classic game right to your Nintendo Switch™, perfect for beginners and pool sharks alike! 

Pool Fever offers a fun, accessible, and realistic billiards experience. With stunning 3D graphics and intuitive gameplay, you’ll feel like you’re playing in your favorite bar or pool hall. Whether you want to play in solo mode or challenge a friend in 2-player local multiplayer – either way, the table is set for hours of entertainment.

Choose from 10 different table designs, 15 unique cues, and 5 custom cue balls to create your perfect game setup. With three difficulty levels, you'll always have a challenge no matter your skill level.

So, chalk your cue, line up your shot, and sink the 8-ball - it’s game time!

Features:

10 different table designs 
15 unique cues sticks
5 custom cue balls 
3 difficulty levels
Play solo or in 2-player local multiplayer
Realistic 3D graphics

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #4 with:

- 15 new pool table designs
- 5 new pool cues designs
70070000034090.intro: The classic pool experience, right at home!
70070000034090.name: Pool Fever Legendary Edition

70070000034102.description:
Get ready to test your aim and precision in Darts Fever, the ultimate darts game experience!

Take on classic and exciting game modes like 201, 301, 501, Cricket, and Around the Clock. Whether you're sharpening your solo skills or challenging up to 3 friends in local multiplayer, Darts Fever delivers non-stop dart-throwing fun. 

An innovative aim mechanic and stunning 3D graphics make every game an authentic dart-throwing experience. And with motion-controlled Joy-Con™ support, you can truly feel the action as you throw your darts with realistic movement, just like you’re playing in a real-life pub match!

Grab your darts, take aim, and hit the bullseye!

6 unique board designs
10 custom dart styles
5 game modes
Single-player or up to 4 players multi-player
Motion control Joy-Con support
Realistic 3d Graphics and throwing mechanic

This bundle includes base game, Stylish Precision #1 and Stylish Precision #3 with:

- 10 brand-new dart designs
70070000034102.intro: Step Up to the toe line!
70070000034102.name: Darts Fever Superior Edition

70070000034354.description:
Design Your Dream Home!

Step into your cosy virtual house and unleash your creativity!

Decorate seven beautifully crafted rooms — living room, kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, office, hallway, and veranda — each ready to reflect your unique style.

Pick your favourite wall colours, wallpapers, floors, rugs, and furniture to make each room truly your own. Experiment, mix styles, and see your dream home come to life!

Keep your favourite designs and return to them anytime.
Take a picture of your creation without menus or buttons in the way!

Outside your window, the world changes with four beautiful seasons – from sunny spring and summer, through colourful autumn, to snowy winter.

Easy to play, relaxing, and full of creativity – perfect for young decorators with big imaginations!

Decorate, play, and make your home the cosiest place ever!

This bundle includes base game, Cozy Living and Creative Desk with:

-Cozy Living includes stylish sofas, chairs, and accessories that will give your living room a unique atmosphere. Create a space you’ll always want to come back to.
-Creative Desk includes an elegant desk, a comfortable chair, and other accessories that let you create your dream office. Work in style!
70070000034354.intro: Create, decorate, and make your dream home come true!
70070000034354.name: Little Cozy Home Complete Edition

70070000034428.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of bowling with Bowling Fever!

Test your skills in countless game modes, visit amazingly realistic 3D locations, play fantastic mini-games and discover dozens of new bowling balls and pins!

Need a hand? Various power-ups and boosts will help you to meet the challenges.

A bowling game has never been this exciting!

- Fantastic bowling alleys from around the world.
- Fantastic 20+ balls, pins and lanes to show off!
- Multiple mini-games to complete.
- Multiple game modes to play!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #5 with:

-20 new bowling ball styles
70070000034428.intro: Fire up "Bowling Fever" and be carried away by the emotions!
70070000034428.name: Bowling Fever Infinite Edition

70070000034429.description:
Racers, beware! 

Fast-paced, polished and dynamic motorbike racing now on Nintendo Switch™!

One of a kind game entirely playable with... Toy-Con™ Motorbike!

Forget about speed limits and traffic rules 'cause on this road you're the boss!

A unique mix of endless and arcade racing game featuring countless hours of fun!

IN MOTO RUSH GT YOU WILL FIND:

• Over 100 levels to beat!
• Endless racing experience
• 12 customizable motorbikes
• Toy-Con Motorbike support
• Race against time, ghost opponents or try various challenges! 
• Motion Controls – play by rotating your console!
• Play with the Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller
• Support all play styles - TV Mode, Tabletop Mode, Handheld Mode, Toy-Con Motorbike
• Experience 4 different game modes 
• Weather and day-cycle effects: rain, night, storm! 
• Experience beautifully designed roads around the world

This bundle includes base game, Full Garage , Grip Collection #1, Grip Collection #2 and Grip Collection #3 with:

- Complete your collection and discover new ways to conquer the streets with as many as 13 new vehicles—including an ATV and bicycle!
- 20 pairs of state-of-the-art racing gloves, crafted for the ultimate grip and control.
70070000034429.intro: Ultimate motorbike racing experience for all ages!
70070000034429.name: Moto Rush GT Max Edition

70070000034433.description:
In S.N.I.P.E.R.: Hunter Scope you will shoot, you will fight, and you will win!

Play S.N.I.P.E.R., the latest sniping game where you aim, fight and destroy virtual enemies. Try different types of missions, inspired both by classic rail shooters and modern cover shooters. Fight your way out during day and night, destroy evil forces and unlock new weapons and power-ups.

Game includes:
15+ STAGES
30+ WEAPONS
30+ GALLERY ITEMS
60+ SPECIAL ACHIEVEMENTS 

Become a hunter, mount your scope, and fight for our freedom!

This bundle includes base game, Elite Arsenal, Target Acquired and Neon Strike with:

-RVL-357-WES pistol: a classic revolver with a timeless design 
-BK-47-CAM rifle: a rugged and reliable rifle inspired by the old west 
-SN-1100-TRI sniper rifle: a modern-day cowboy sniper rifle 
- RIF-16-DOT rifle: a high-tech rifle with a dot sight for quick target acquisition 
- SN-200-FOR sniper rifle: a powerful and accurate sniper rifle for long-range engagements 
- SN-300-FFD sniper rifle: a versatile sniper rifle for special assignments
- SN-400-SKY sniper rifle: a sleek design combined with cutting-edge technology
-SHG-12-AQA: an aquatic-themed shotgun, with a blast like -an ocean wave
-UZ-90-CLD: a frosty Uzi, delivering a cool demise
-SN-1200-NEO: a sniper rifle straight out of a neon dream, precision only matched by its glowing elegance.
70070000034433.name: S.N.I.P.E.R. - Hunter Scope Master Edition

70070000034449.description:
Discover the perfect balance of strategy and skill in Snooker Fever. This game brings the classic snooker experience to the Nintendo Switch™, whether you're a seasoned snooker player or just picking up a cue for the first time.

With 10 beautifully crafted tables, customizable cues, and CPU opponents that keep you on your toes, every game feels fresh. Take on the challenge solo or invite a friend for some local competition. Focus on sinking that perfect shot, while the stunning 3D visuals capture the atmosphere of a real snooker hall.

Snooker Fever has all the tools you need to master the game, enjoy some friendly competition, and just have a great time.

Key Features:

10 different tables 
15 custom cues 
3 levels of opponents
Local multiplayer 
Smooth controls and realistic 3D graphics

This bundle includes base game, Expansion Pack #2, Expansion Pack #3 and Expansion Pack #4 with:

- 15 stunning new table designs
- 10 sleek cue styles
70070000034449.intro: The classic pool experience, right at home!
70070000034449.name: Snooker Fever Definitive Edition

70070000034452.description:
Football Legends 2025 brings the thrill of the world’s most popular sport to your Nintendo Switch™!

Step onto the pitch and experience pure football excitement across multiple game modes and stadiums.

Play a Quick Match for instant action — perfect for a fast-paced challenge alone or with friends in local multiplayer.

Want more control? Choose the Single Match mode to select your favorite team, stadium, weather, and time of day — and compete head-to-head with friends or AI opponents.

Take on the ultimate challenge in Tournament Mode, where 16 elite teams battle for glory. Only the best can lift the trophy!

Multiple stadiums, each offering customizable weather conditions — from sunny afternoons to rainy nights under the floodlights.

Get ready to kick off, score spectacular goals, and become a true Football Legend!

This bundle includes the base game and Team Pack #3 with:
- three new teams
70070000034452.intro: Play. Score. Win. Become a Football Legend!
70070000034452.name: Football Legends 2025 Premium Edition

70070000034455.description:
Get behind the wheel in Motorbikes Pro 2025 and experience the excitement of high-speed racing! With stunning graphics and intuitive controls, this game is perfect for racers of all ages. 

This thrilling racing game puts you right in the driver’s seat of fast-paced Motorbikes racing action. Feel the rush as you speed through corners, overtake opponents, and navigate each twist and turn of the track with precision. Accessible, fun, and incredibly addictive!

Choose your car, perfect your timing, and race your way to glory. The track is calling, and the thrill of victory is just one race away!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #3 with:

-2 sets of premium skins for motorbikes
70070000034455.intro: Feel the Speed, Own the Track!
70070000034455.name: Motorbikes Pro 2025 Platinium Edition

70070000034459.description:
Feel the Speed. Rule the Streets.

Step into the world of high-octane drag racing, where every millisecond counts and every gear shift can decide your fate.

Welcome to a vibrant metropolis bursting with neon lights, roaring engines, and pure adrenaline.

Test your reflexes and precision in intense straight-line races across ¼ mile, ½ mile, or full-mile tracks — both by day and under the dazzling glow of city nights.

Upgrade, tune, and customise more than 60 unique cars to dominate your rivals. Boost your engine, fine-tune your gearbox, unleash the nitro, and leave your opponents in a trail of smoke and shattered pride.

Shift. Launch. Win.

Every second counts. Every victory matters.
Feel the rush of nitro, the thrill of precision, and the glory of crossing the finish line first.

It’s not just a race — it’s a lifestyle.

This bundle includes the base game, Nightfall Boost and Sunrise Burnout with:
- new track bathed in morning light
- new track soaked in sunset
70070000034459.intro: Feel the speed, master the nitro, and rule the streets!
70070000034459.name: Nitrous Fury Complete Edition

70070000034462.description:
Step behind the counter and take on the challenge of serving up delicious meals and perfectly brewed coffee in this fast-paced, classic cooking game. Work your way through 10 unique cafes, each with its own style and demands, as you master recipes, upgrade your equipment, and keep your customers happy. 

Outside the kitchen, bring new life to Grandma’s old house by decorating it with fun furniture and personal touches. Along the way, you’ll uncover a heartfelt story of friendships, family, and finding your place in a city full of contrasts. Whether you’re here for the cooking or the story, Pixel Cafe delivers an adventure full of charm and challenges.

This bundle includes base game, Kitchen Touches and Bedroom Touches #2 with:

A different variant for the Refrigerator
An updated Oven and Stove design
A new look for the Sink
An alternative style for the Bar
A simple variant for the Bed
An alternative design for the Lamp
Also, mix things up with 4 new wallpapers suitable for any room!
70070000034462.intro: From kitchen chaos to cozy moments
70070000034462.name: Pixel Cafe Discovery Edition

70010000117392.description:
Welcome to Sand Seeker, an exploration adventure set in an ancient desert city on the edge of the pyramids.

Roam sunlit streets, sandstone buildings, hidden alleys, and open desert paths as the great pyramids loom in the distance. Search for lost locations scattered throughout the city and surrounding sands. Every corner tells a story shaped by time, sand, and history.

Sand Seeker focuses on atmospheric exploration — no rush, no pressure — just discovery in a timeless desert world.

Features:

>Ancient Egyptian-inspired city environment

>Search-and-find exploration gameplay

>Hidden secrets to uncover

>Immersive desert atmosphere
70010000117392.intro: Walk the ancient paths. Seek what was lost.
70010000117392.name: Sand Seeker

70010000098723.description:
This story revolves around the frog-hopping tactical battler Frogtime. Collect, buy and trade frogs and use them to build an unbeatable roster.

Embark on a quest to defeat the local bully, and get sidetracked – play music, infiltrate a beehive (disguised as a bee), and maybe get in a sled race with a vampire.

Fully voice acted by us and our friends but also features a number of surprising special guests.

Grab your toadbag, count those cocoduds, and explore a gently absurd world where everything is resolved with frog battles.

Features:
- a bear in a frog onesie
- a giant skeleton man
- a normal sized skeleton man
- at least 12 heartfelt moments about the importance of community and what it means to have self-worth
- you can put hats on the frogs :3
70010000098723.intro: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime is a frog-obsessed comedy adventure featuring tactical frog battles, bizarre quests, and the mother of all frogs: the motherfrogger.
70010000098723.name: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime

70010000099940.description:
This edition of MLB The Show 26 includes:
 • 5 The Show Packs
