70010000111818.description:
“Without a doubt one of the best puzzle games I’ve ever played.”
IGN

“One of the very best puzzle games of the year, if not the decade.”
PC Gamer 

Opus Magnum: Complete Edition is the latest open-ended puzzle game from Zachtronics, the creators of SpaceChem, Infinifactory, TIS-100, and SHENZHEN I/O. Includes both Opus Magnum and the brand-new De Re Metallica expansion.

Master the intricate, physical machinery of the transmutation engine— the alchemical engineer’s most advanced tool— and use it to create vital remedies, precious gemstones, deadly weapons, and more.

Hailed as the most promising alchemist of his generation, Anataeus Vaya has just accepted a position as Head Alchemist of House Van Tassen, the oldest and richest of the city’s ancient Houses. But dangers lurk behind the family’s opulent facade, and alchemy alone may not solve every problem.


Design Machines - Design and build machines that carry out alchemical processes using a variety of components including programmable arms, customizable tracks, and more esoteric devices like Van Berlo’s wheel and the Glyph of Animismus.

Open-Ended Puzzles - Compete against your friends and the world to build the simplest, fastest, and most compact solutions to the game’s challenges. 

Rich Story - Intrigues and dark plots swirl around the city’s ancient Houses. Alchemists, who hold the power to create almost anything known to science, are highly sought— and highly dangerous.

Solitaire Minigame - Alchemical engineering takes focus and concentration. Take a break with Sigmar’s Garden, an original alchemy-based solitaire game. Every game is winnable, but not every game will be won…
De Re Metallica – An expansive prequel to Opus Magnum that includes 3 new glyphs, 17 new puzzles, and a new solitaire variant called “House Colvan.”
70010000111818.name: Opus Magnum: Complete Edition

70050000066652.description: This bonus content for MLB The Show 26 includes 15 The Show Packs, 2 World Baseball Classic Choice Packs, 1 Legend Choice Pack, 1 World Baseball Classic Uniform Choice Pack, Double Daily Rewards, 1 Cover Athlete Bat Skin Pack, and 20,000 Stubs™. Once acquired, items should be redeemed upon booting the game.
70050000066652.intro: Make your mark. Become a Legend. Own The Show™.
70050000066652.name: Digital Deluxe Edition Bonus Content

70070000034285.description:
This bundle of games will give you a taste of the excitement of opening a shop in your town and expanding your business worldwide. Attract like-minded individuals and help them discover something unique! Create an iconic meeting place for your friends! 

Check 3 amazing games in one pack
- Trading Card Shop Simulator
- Collectible Cars Shop Simulator
- Retro Geek Shop Simulator

Expand and upgrade your stores. Transform all spaces into a stylish haven for clients and embrace your inner perfectionist. 

Arrange the shops and add new features so that everyone can find what they are looking for. Create designated areas for buying, trading and playing.   

Add smart features to make shopping easier and help you stay organised. 

Search for hidden gems and sell them to eager customers. Find rare items to complete your collection! 

Act like a real entrepreneur!
- Keep your inventory fresh and exciting by stocking up on goods.
- Set your prices to strike the right balance between profit and demand. Will you aim for high profit margins, or attract more customers with discounts?
- You decide when to open your shop and when to restock.
- Build your reputation — remember that customer reviews shape your success! Keep your customers happy and watch your shop grow.
- Customise your store with posters, shelves, and eye-catching displays to make it your own.
- Some products are particularly special — if you can get hold of them, you can sell them at a huge profit!

Can you turn your small shop into the ultimate shopping haven? Prepare to manage, sell and grow in these amazing shopping simulators!
70070000034285.intro: Can you turn your small shop into the ultimate shopping haven? Prepare to manage, sell and grow in these amazing shopping simulators!
70070000034285.name: Shop Simulator Collection Bundle: Trading Card & Collectible Cars & Retro Geek

70010000095063.description: Northern Bear is crawling with penguins! The Emperor Penguin is moving his minions north of the arctic circle, and it’s up to Walnut the Walrus and Noklas the Narwhal to freeze them in their tracks! Use Walnut’s Walrus Wind to freeze penguins into ice-blocks. Use the ice-blocks to build new paths, stairs, and bridges! This simple concept is the foundation of a whole adventure of puzzling predicaments.
70010000095063.name: Let's Freeze Some Penguins

70010000103669.description:
Where did gorillas come from? What are gorillas? Where are gorillas going? A single-player game of gorillas— That is GORITIA! Fill the jungle with gorillas!

Expand the gorilla habitat by growing the troop while ensuring a steady supply of bananas. To achieve victory, seven or more gorillas must be aligned on the ground. However, if any gorilla is left without food, defeat follows—marking the total collapse of the troop.
70010000103669.intro:
Growing the gorilla troop.
A single-player card game.
No more bananas—the end.
70010000103669.name: Goritaire

70010000107181.description:
BANG! BANG! BANDITS is an all new, original shooting game. It adopts simple rules and controls while maintaining the tension and exhilaration of the classic genre of gun shooting games. This means that it can be enjoyed by a wide range of people, from children to adults. It features colorful, adorable characters and an easy-to-understand world.

■Intuitive controls that require zero explanation! Anyone can play immediately!
Simple controls: just hold the Joy-Con™ in one hand as a handgun and aim and shoot at the enemies on the screen!!
Automatically move around the field, aim and shoot at all the enemies that appear, and collect lots and lots of coins!
There is no bullet limit, so you can fire as much as you want!
There's nothing to it, just shoot away!

■12 types of stages x 2 leagues, for a lot of fun to be had!
The Normal League, where the battles take place, has 12 stages with different characteristics, including jungles, urban areas, ruins, and caves.
Once you've conquered all the stages in the Normal League, you can challenge the Wild League, which is the most difficult mode available!

■Unique enemy characters run amok all over the screen!
Defeat the Goomin that attack you one after another, and defeat the evil boss waiting at the end of the stage!

■Enjoy 2 different ways to play: Challenge Mode and Battle Mode! 
Start with low-class stages in Challenge Mode and then conquer the most difficult stages.
You can play alone or in a team of 2 to 4 people! If each player has a Joy-Con, you can enjoy competitive play, such as single battles (individual battles) where 2-4 players compete for the highest score, or team battles where 2 teams of 2 players compete for the highest score!
70010000107181.intro:
Bang bang away! It feels great!
A new party-style shooting game that can be enjoyed by both children and adults is now available!
70010000107181.name: BANG! BANG! BANDITS

70010000108839.description:
BANG! BANG! BANDITS, the party-style gun shooting game that the whole family can enjoy, is now available as the Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition!

Set in a bright and pop world with simple controls anyone can master, this title has been further powered up by the performance of the Nintendo Switch 2.

With new support for GameShare, you can now easily play together not only with those nearby but also with people far away. Furthermore, the visuals have evolved to be even more beautiful and vivid! Enjoy an even more thrilling gameplay experience on a high-impact screen with silky-smooth motion.

■Intuitive controls that require zero explanation! Anyone can play immediately!
Simple controls: just hold the Joy-Con™ in one hand as a handgun and aim and shoot at the enemies on the screen!!
Automatically move around the field, aim and shoot at all the enemies that appear, and collect lots and lots of coins!
There is no bullet limit, so you can fire as much as you want!
There's nothing to it, just shoot away!

■12 types of stages x 2 leagues, for a lot of fun to be had!
The Normal League, where the battles take place, has 12 stages with different characteristics, including jungles, urban areas, ruins, and caves.
Once you've conquered all the stages in the Normal League, you can challenge the Wild League, which is the most difficult mode available!

■Unique enemy characters run amok all over the screen!
Defeat the Goomin that attack you one after another, and defeat the evil boss waiting at the end of the stage!

■Enjoy 2 different ways to play: Challenge Mode and Battle Mode! 
Start with low-class stages in Challenge Mode and then conquer the most difficult stages.
You can play alone or in a team of 2 to 4 people! If each player has a Joy-Con, you can enjoy competitive play, such as single battles (individual battles) where 2-4 players compete for the highest score, or team battles where 2 teams of 2 players compete for the highest score!
70010000108839.intro:
Bang bang away! It feels great!
A new party-style shooting game that can be enjoyed by both children and adults is now available!
70010000108839.name: BANG! BANG! BANDITS Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000112213.description:
DigDigDrill is a mining, ore-collecting, and drill-customization simulation game where you carve out the underground world step-by-step at your own pace.

Dig, collect, and grow stronger. This is the definitive edition of "steady progress" mining that you won't be able to put down!
Use the resources you gather to create your very own original drill.
Let's dig deep into a cozy world with no enemies and no time limits!

<<< DigDigDrill Features >>>
- Mindless fun with mining and treasure hunting
- Block-puzzle style forging to enhance your drill just the way you like it
- Equipment with various special effects for efficient digging
- Extra stages appear after clearing the game for even more fun!

◆ Steady Digging
Dig through the earth and collect ores and treasure chests. Your goal: Floor 999!
Once your bag is full, head back to the surface to drop off your haul.

◆ Puzzle x Forging
Craft new drills using the ores you've collected.
If you fit the ores into the blueprints just right, you might create the ultimate drill.

◆ Choose Your Gear
If you're lucky, your drill will gain special effects. Combine them wisely to boost your efficiency!
- Specialize in movement speed to transport resources to the surface quickly
- Power up your bombs to blast through large areas at once
The choice is yours!

◆ End-Game Content
High-difficulty stages await you after the main clear.
The treasures you'll find there are just as powerful!

<<< Recommended for people who: >>>
- Want to lose themselves in satisfying "grind" tasks
- Love grinning at a massive collection of items
- Enjoy theory-crafting builds in hack-and-slash games
- Are looking for a relaxing game to unwind
70010000112213.intro:
Dig, Build, and Grow Stronger
Relaxing ground mining and ore collection
Aim for B999 and beyond with your custom drill!
70010000112213.name: DigDigDrill

70010000115158.description:
<STORY>
After returning from Tokyo to the island where he once lived, Yu Kirishima, the protagonist,
reunites with his childhood friend, Sekai Minase.

Sekai, who had once dreamed of becoming an idol,
now seems to have lost her sparkle and is on the verge of giving up on that dream.

Wanting to see her smile again, Yu makes a proposal—
to debut as a virtual idol named “Isekaijoucho”,
based on an illustration he drew himself.

<SYSTEM>
This is a fully voiced adventure game featuring a story-driven experience combined with a training system that lets you guide Sekai on her path to becoming a top virtual idol.

Depending on how you train her, Sekai’s growth, goals, and ultimately her destiny will change,
leading to multiple possible endings.
70010000115158.intro: "I want to be a virtual idol! And I want to face this challenge with you!"
70010000115158.name: Virtual Ties Isekaijoucho Träumerei

70010000116272.description:
The best part of delivering mail? You can open every single letter and look through everyone’s business! Whilst in the real world this is a crime, on Arralla Isle it’s perfectly acceptable, and even encouraged!

At the Arralla Isle Deliberry service, you'll have to solve where each letter goes through pictograms drawn on each envelope - and they're not always obvious!

Learn of the island residents' interpersonal problems through reading their mail - they will need your help to resolve them! Meet big booty cutie fruits like grouchy glassblowers, silly scientists, and deliver seriously creepy letters to an ominous house on a hill...

On Arralla Isle, there’s no rush. The pace is slow, like a lazy summer day, so you can relax while you play. Exploration is a treat in this beautiful Australian landscape.

Snap photos, kick over chessboard pieces, read about Arralla Isle's history, throw stuff, discover secrets. The island is your oyster. You can even call your mum!

There's plenty to do as a mail delivery turnip on Arralla Isle!
70010000116272.intro: Play as a turnip with a big juicy bum delivering mail to a cast of colourful characters on an Australian island. Get the mail where it needs to go by reading residents' letters!
70010000116272.name: Letters to Arralla

70050000070168.description:
By purchasing this content, you can upgrade the Nintendo Switch™ version of "BANG! BANG! BANDITS" to the "BANG! BANG! BANDITS Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition."

The Nintendo Switch version of "BANG! BANG! BANDITS" is required to use this content. Additionally, if the latest update data is available, please update the software before use.
70050000070168.intro: "BANG! BANG! BANDITS" now with GameShare! Play with anyone, anywhere! Experience powerful visuals in stunning high-res and high FPS!
70050000070168.name: BANG! BANG! BANDITS Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70010000093056.description:
Immerse yourself in the vibrant world of K-pop and discover 12 talented girls who dream of fame.

Each one has her own personality, aspirations, and style, but they all share one goal: to shine on stage.

Can you make them fall for you before their big debut takes them away forever?


Game Features:

● 12 girls, 12 unique styles: From the sweet and shy girl to the explosive diva, each aspiring idol has her own charm and challenges. Discover what makes them tick and how to win their hearts.

● Dynamic conversations and strategic flirting: Talk to them, send messages, earn their trust, and plan the perfect date. Will you be their number one fan or the love of their life?

● Affinity meter: Your choices will influence how they feel about you. Can you make their hearts beat to the rhythm of your words?

● Multiple endings: Will you win over your favourite girl, or will you end up in the dreaded friend zone? Every decision leads to a different story.

● 30 days to conquer stardom (and their hearts): Time is running out. Every interaction and every word matters.


Do you have what it takes to steal the hearts of future K-pop queens and become their inspiration?

Find out in this adventure filled with romance, music, and unexpected twists!
70010000093056.intro: Conquer the Hearts of Future K-pop Stars in 30 Days!
70010000093056.name: K-pop Idols Dating: Anime Love for PinkOrbil T.

70010000096721.description: You run your own perfume store as the owner of a perfume store. A sudden accident has involved you in the investigation of your own resurrection from the dead. The truth gradually emerges  with three employees - a love affair about perfume.  Harvest the memories of your own heartbeat in the game!
70010000096721.intro: “Aroma Love Ready!” is a whimsical fantasy rom-com! Enjoy sweet romance wrapped in lighthearted comedy!
70010000096721.name: Aroma Love Ready!

70010000114251.description:
Team up or go solo, unleash powerful upgrades, and conquer unique modes like Paint, Minefield, and Invisibility as you clear every foe and push to the next level. 

This is a fast-paced couch co-op action game for 1 to 4 players, built for old-school living room fun. Play solo or with friends, clear enemy-packed stages, and experiment with wild power-ups and game modes that keep every match fresh.

Battle through 30 different stages, each filled with enemies to wipe out before you can advance. Treasure chests scattered around the arena grant new abilities—boost your speed, increase your power, or even slip straight through walls to outsmart your opponents.

Whether you are teaming up or going head-to-head, the special modes change how you play: 

• Paint Mode – Shoot paint, teleport around the map or hide in plain sight to ambush your opponents
• Minefield Mode – Drop deadly mines and turn the arena into a trap-filled maze
• Invisibility Mode – Vanish from sight and rely on your instincts to survive and strike first
• Single-Player Mode – Take on mission-based challenges tailored for solo play

Perfect for quick sessions or long game nights, this offline multiplayer brawler keeps everyone shouting, laughing, and begging for “one more round.”

Feature List
• Couch co-op for 1–4 players – Play solo or with friends on the same screen.
• Offline multiplayer & single-player – No online required; just plug in and play.
• 4 unique game modes – Paint, Minefield, Invisibility, and mission-based Single-Player.
• 30 handcrafted stages – Battle through a wide variety of levels and layouts.
• Powerful pick-ups – Open treasure chests for speed boosts, power upgrades, and wall-passing abilities
70010000114251.intro: Grab your friends, hit the couch, and blast through 30 chaotic stages in this local co-op battle game for 1–4 players.
70010000114251.name: Blastoids

70010000117660.description:
Shuri, the people of the sky, became a messenger of the golden dragon of the king of the sky and headed for HestiaFort.

In HestiaFort, there is a Red Bird.

Together with Shuri, run through HestiaFort to meet the Red Bird.

In this game, you will avoid the red ball and aim for the blue circle.

Run and fly through stages to reach the goal.
70010000117660.intro: At the end of the blue sky that spreads out like the sea, HestiaFort
70010000117660.name: HestiaFort

70010000118295.description:
The ball is coming.
Scared of getting hit?

Now is the time to be brave.
Don’t look away.

Bend both elbows and catch it in front of your chest!

Amazing.
Yes, you can do it. You did it. You really did!
70010000118295.intro:
Hold the Joy-Con™ in both hands!
For kids who aren’t good at dodgeball.
And for adults who want to try it again after a long time.
70010000118295.name: Enter the Dodgeball

70070000031790.description:
Three complete games. One emotional collection.

This bundle brings together Heartbeat Hospital: Love, Lies, and Betrayal, Adopt an Animal Near Me, and Cat Veterinary: Emergency Hospital Close to Me, offering three different experiences centered on care, responsibility, and emotional connection.

In Heartbeat Hospital: Love, Lies, and Betrayal, relationships unfold inside a hospital where emotions run high. Decisions, dialogue, and hidden truths shape a dramatic story filled with tension, romance, and difficult choices.

Adopt an Animal Near Me invites you into a calmer, heartfelt experience focused on helping animals find a new home. Meet different animals, learn their stories, and guide them toward adoption through care and attention.

In Cat Veterinary: Emergency Hospital Close to Me, you step into the role of a veterinarian, treating cats in urgent situations. Diagnose conditions, provide care, and help your furry patients recover in a fast-paced but compassionate environment.

From emotional storytelling to cozy simulation gameplay, each game offers a different tone while sharing a common theme: caring for others and responding to meaningful moments.

Whether you enjoy narrative drama, relaxing animal care, or hands on veterinary challenges, this bundle delivers hours of engaging gameplay at a reduced price.

Three games.
Three emotional journeys.
One bundle to experience.

Are you ready?
70070000031790.intro:
Three heartfelt experiences.
One bundle full of hours of fun.
Who will you care for first?
70070000031790.name: Hospital & Animal Care Collection: 3 Game Bundle

70010000074147.description:
The year is 12,012. Multiquadrillionaire monopoly "GSSAI CO." has been in power of the universe for centuries after a world-ending bioweapon was unleashed onto the masses. And now? The solar system has been destroyed by unknown celestial forces. A weapons development program run by the Earth subsidiary of "GSSAI CO." is fast progressing. And the world's denizens are disappearing.

That is until one man screws up a game of pool.

HERO OF THE STARS AND THE SKY
● Use your tongue to lick enemies and objects as you make your way through open metroidvania-like areas, whilst collecting "Planet Bits" to help fix the solar system!

WELCOME TO RUBATO WORLD
● 5 compact, densely packed areas ranging from a huge sprawling bakery to the world's most poorly planned city. Uncover secrets and shortcuts in every corner of the world.

IF I COULD ONLY LOVE
● A strange, funny plot with a deep focus on humour and character writing. It gets silly. It gets serious. Really concerningly serious. Uh. Is the guy who made this game okay..?

BUT FIRST, LOVE YOURSELF
● To save the world, you must save yourself first. Find yourself again.
70010000074147.intro: RUBATO, an experimental, 2D physics-based take on the collect-a-thon genre!
70010000074147.name: RUBATO

70010000099824.description:
When tyranny takes control… someone has to pull the trigger. Machine Gun Fury is a bold revival of the classic arcade military shooter — no cover systems, no moral debates, just pure reflex-driven carnage. It’s you, your trigger finger, and a limited supply of grenades against entire armies. If you grew up blasting through classic arcade games, welcome back to the frontline, soldier.

Blast your way through enemy armies with nothing but sharp reflexes, heavy firepower, and a limited supply of grenades. Liberate 8 explosive regions packed with screen-filling bosses, relentless waves of enemies, and high-intensity run-and-gun action. 

Step into the boots of three unstoppable soldiers armed to the teeth and ready to bring tyranny to its knees:

- Gunner Jimbo – A walking assault division. Built for suppressive fire and zero compromise. If he stops shooting, something big is about to explode.
- Suzi Uzi – Fast, tactical, and merciless. She doesn’t waste bullets. She doesn’t miss. She doesn’t stop moving.
- Mini-Gun Floyd – The embodiment of sustained fire. When those barrels spin up, the battlefield becomes a memory.

Three warriors. One impossible mission. Infinite enemies.

Fight on foot or take control of heavily armed vehicles including tanks, boats, and combat buggies. Unleash a full arsenal of military-grade weaponry and trigger explosive chain reactions that turn enemy strongholds into rubble. If it moves — eliminate it.

- Fast-paced top-down and side-scrolling run-and-gun gameplay
- Full range of combat weaponry delivering large-scale destruction and huge body counts
- Authentic 8-bit pixel art powered by modern enhancements
- Destructible elements, screen shake, particle effects, and layered parallax backgrounds
- Explosive SID-inspired soundtrack that hits like an arcade cabinet turned up to max

Press Start. Pull the trigger. Feel the Fury.
70010000099824.intro: Dive into a bold arcade-inspired shooter with explosive 2D action!
70010000099824.name: Machine Gun Fury

70010000103248.description:
Rip through retro-futuristic Tokyo highways in a demonic pursuit of speed and power! Lane split through heavy traffic and dominate tracks filled with obstacles on an action-packed mission to overcome possession. Uncover the truth behind your curse through scattered collectible manga pages. Are you fast enough to outrun your demons? 

About This Game

Immerse yourself in Neo-Tokyo’s intense world of motorcycle racing. Clear levels at neck-breaking speeds and avoid hitting innocent commuters. 
After totaling your bike in a race, you stumble upon a demon-possessed engine in a junkyard that offers speeds and power you can’t refuse. Battle for freedom from possession and overcome the darkness!

KILLER SPEEDS

Combining the thrilling elements of a 3D runner, maneuver through fast-paced levels by performing wheelies, ducking, sliding, and jumping. Racers can also increase their maneuverability by adjusting their speed, accelerating and decelerating depending on the environment they face. 

Pop wheelies while accelerating to great speeds as you lane split and duck for precision steering. Avoid decapitation in rapidly changing track environments by sliding across asphalt while avoiding numerous barriers. Keep the adrenaline pumping as you launch yourself on ramps and weave through congested Tokyo streets. 

Collect Demonic Symbols And Unlock Manga 

Find Demonic Symbols scattered throughout 45 levels, including unlockables that can only be accessed by completing skill objectives in each level. 

Each level contains three skill objectives:
•	Finishing at a record-breaking time
•	Zero demolition, avoid colliding with high-speed traffic
•	Near misses: drive close enough to kiss cars without colliding 

Demonic Symbols claimed unlock chapters of manga, progressing you deeper into the unfolding story. 

45 Challenging Levels 

You’re thrown into a vibrant, futuristic Tokyo, packed with stunning visuals and expertly crafted tracks that push your limits with each new level unlocked. 

Each zone offers its own vibe. Drift through power plants, duck into collapsing tunnels as you test your skill, and break through windows as you shred through a neon-drenched shopping mall. Every environment is fast and unforgiving. 

Difficulty increases as you progress through levels. Later levels will push your skills to the edge. Hidden collectibles can be found throughout levels, easy to spot early on, but harder to find as you advance. Master the toughest paths to claim them all and keep the adrenaline pumping.
70010000103248.intro:
Rip through retro-futuristic Tokyo highways!
Lane split through heavy traffic and dominate tracks filled with obstacles on an action-packed mission to overcome possession.
70010000103248.name: Moto Rush Reborn

70010000106445.description:
Command An Army Of Ghosts  
Summon and control a legion of ghosts, banshees, gremlins, and more, each with unique abilities. Your ghoulish goons are more terrifying (and entertaining) than ever.  
 
Strategy Meets Supernatural  
Blend tactics, adventure, and resource management in a seamless gameplay loop set within a richly built paranormal world. 
 
Solve Mysteries, Unleash Horror 
Every haunting is a puzzle. Use spectral strategy and powers to uncover secrets, manipulate mortals, and complete objectives.  
 
Rediscover the Fear  
Ghost Master: Resurrection invites you to master the art of fear in a beautifully reimagined supernatural playground. The dead have risen... and they're under your control.
70010000106445.intro: Terror Reimagined for a New Generation
70010000106445.name: Ghost Master: Resurrection

70010000115403.description:
Step into the role of Takashi Hayato, a samurai turned ronin after the murder of his lord. Set in feudal Japan during the Sengoku era, the game follows a journey of revenge, honor, and difficult choices.
Master skill-based katana combat with light and heavy attacks, blocks, parries, counterattacks, and executions. Use stealth to strike from the shadows or face enemies head-on in intense duels. Archery supports combat, offering tactical options in battle.

Progress through story-driven levels set in villages, temples, mountain paths, and enemy strongholds. Your actions shape the Honor Karma System — follow the Path of Honor to gain survivability, or the Path of Blood to embrace raw power. Karma influences gameplay bonuses and determines the final ending.

Key Features

- Skill-based katana combat with light, heavy, parry, counter, and execution mechanics
- Stealth gameplay with detection, silent kills, and risk-reward encounters
- Archery support for tactical combat and positioning
- Atmospheric levels inspired by feudal Japan
- Cinematic boss duels that test timing, focus, and resolve
- A branching Honor Karma system that shapes gameplay and story outcomes

Your journey ends where honor, revenge, and destiny collide.
Only your choices will decide whether Takashi becomes a legendary warrior, a ruthless survivor, or a ronin lost to history.
70010000115403.intro: Fight with honor. Decide your fate.
70010000115403.name: Samurai Simulator: Kensei Warrior

70010000116618.description: Spy Guy is a brilliant detective who travels around the world looking for hidden clues. This time, he needs your help to find identical pairs! Can you help him?
70010000116618.intro: Can you find two identical hidden objects?
70010000116618.name: Spot the Spy Guy

70010000119667.description:
Build your legacy from the ground up! In Castle Factory Tycoon, you aren’t just a king—you’re an industrial mastermind. Transform a small plot of land into a sprawling, impenetrable fortress by mastering the art of the forge.

Forge. Sell. Expand.
Start your journey by purchasing your first Droppers. Watch as they churn out essential gear for the realm. From sturdy axes and shields to mystical glowing potions, every item created is gold in your pocket.

Massive Construction.
With over 160 unique upgrades and items to buy, your castle will never stop growing. You can even upgrade your upgraders!


Features:
>Rebirth System: Reached the top? Reset your progress to earn permanent money multipliers! Every rebirth makes your next empire grow faster and bigger.

>Auto-Save & Load: Your progress is safe with us. Build at your own pace—your kingdom will be waiting exactly where you left it.

>Stunning Visuals: Watch your empty lot evolve into a bustling medieval powerhouse.


Are you ready to claim your crown?
70010000119667.name: Castle Tycoon Simulator

70070000033097.description:
Terrorise the unsuspecting citizens of Gravenville across 11 fully reimagined locations, from eerie asylums and military compounds to chaotic frat houses and heavily guarded police stations. All included Core Edition. The Core Edition also features two brand-new DLCs included with the base game!

Command An Army Of Ghosts  
Summon and control a legion of ghosts, banshees, gremlins, and more, each with unique abilities. Your ghoulish goons are more terrifying (and entertaining) than ever.  
 
Strategy Meets Supernatural  
Blend tactics, adventure, and resource management in a seamless gameplay loop set within a richly built paranormal world. 
 
Solve Mysteries, Unleash Horror 
Every haunting is a puzzle. Use spectral strategy and powers to uncover secrets, manipulate mortals, and complete objectives.  
 
Rediscover the Fear  
Ghost Master: Resurrection invites you to master the art of fear in a beautifully reimagined supernatural playground. The dead have risen... and they're under your control.
70070000033097.name: Ghost Master: Resurrection Core Edition

70070000033877.description:
Cat Souls:

In Cat Souls, you will be playing as Ruby, an energetic cat with a strange ability. Like all cats, Ruby has more than one life, but not all of them can use their past souls as a platform.

Ruby and her friend went on an adventure and successfully found the mythical Hourglass of time! Sadly the end of that adventure is the beginning of a new one.

Enemies appeared out of nowhere, and our protagonists tried to run but… only Ruby managed to escape. But she still has 7 lives! Now is the time to rescue your friend and get the Hourglass of Time back!

Jump, avoid obstacles, use levers, and collect keys to reach the end of each level in time. The spikes will only take one of your lives, but be careful not to waste them all!


Features:
* 45 levels
* Fun soul game mechanic
* Different obstacles and enemies
* 6 different worlds
* 2D Platformer
* Cute pixel art


Bumballon:

Join Bumballon on this cute but frantic adventure spanning across an incredible world full of dangers!

Explore 7 unique worlds overflowing with beautifully animated graphics and retro game nostalgia. Overcome various perils to save Bumballon's magical kingdom and rescue the beautiful Princess Moon.

Each mistake becomes a lesson to overcome future obstacles in Bumballon’s tough but fun and rewarding journey.


Features:
* Beautiful animated graphics.
* Explore 7 worlds.
* 35 different levels.
* 5 unlockable skins.
* Variety of action mechanics.


Prisonela DX:

Get ready for platforming incarceration insanity in Prisonela DX. These levels may be short, but fun!

Use your special parkour abilities to overcome all the obstacles, and avoid all the traps. Don’t expect to atone for your mistakes in this prison madhouse though. Each time you die, you’ll be warped to a completely different level where you’ll have to adapt and survive.

Do you have what it takes to escape this platforming prison hell? Find out in Prisonela DX!


Features
* Platform action gameplay
* Short levels
* Different skins
* Random level order
* Cute pixel art style
70070000033877.name: Unusual Friends Bundle

70010000117415.description:
Enter Mistfall Ruins, an enchanted forest where ancient stone structures rise through drifting mist.

Wander through glowing woods, winding paths, and forgotten clearings as you explore the glorious Ruins of Mistfall. Each ruin tells a story of a lost age, hidden deep within the forest. Discover different regions, uncover secrets, and seek out every ruin scattered across the land.

Mistfall Ruins is all about exploration, atmosphere, and wonder — rewarding curiosity and careful discovery.

Features:
>Enchanted forest environment
>Majestic ancient ruins to discover
>Multiple areas to explore
>Calm, atmospheric exploration gameplay
>Hidden scenic locations
70010000117415.intro: Follow the mist. Discover the forgotten.
70010000117415.name: Mistfall Ruins

70010000102200.description:
Work with your neighbours and the city council to improve your local community while you settle in to city life. Welcome to Garland, you're gonna love it here!**
**Loving it not guaranteed.
70010000102200.intro:
Move to a new* apartment in the bustling city of Garland! Make friends, find work, and decorate your new home.
*Apartment quality may vary...
70010000102200.name: Moonlight in Garland

70010000107019.description:
About Ariana and the Elder Codex
The Librarian Ariana's mission is to repair the Seven Hero Codices, which have been altered. Due to the terrible damages, magic has vanished from the world.

By utilizing special Librarian magic that allows her to enter Codices, Ariana seeks to mend the books to bring back magic. Can Ariana safely repair each tome and unravel the mysteries hidden within the Library?

Key Features
Restore the books, reclaim the magic — Venture into the Seven Hero Codices as Ariana, defeating enemies to earn new magic spells and abilities that grant access to previously unreachable areas. Restore Repair Points by taking on platforming and combat challenges that put your abilities to the test. Clear Repair Points as quickly as possible for permanent HP boosts and more!

Librarian Magic materializes — With 30+ unlockable magic spells and abilities, mix and match them across six slots as you embark on your journey to repair the altered Codices. Experiment with different combinations to discover what best suits your playstyle.

Clash with the guardians of the altered Codices — Face formidable bosses, each with a devastating arsenal that will test your combat and platforming skills. Dodge spells, time your attacks, and stay on top of your health to prevail.

Harness the power of Magic Items — Mitigate challenges by unlocking, crafting, and equipping Magic Items to boost stats and gain buffs such as elemental boosts, increased critical hits, reduced knockback, and more!
70010000107019.intro: Restore the Codices and unravel the Library's hidden truths...
70010000107019.name: Ariana and the Elder Codex

70010000107111.description: Take hold of your own personal grimoire with this 62-page Digital Art Book, which includes character art, designer notes, a timeline, and more!
70010000107111.name: Ariana and the Elder Codex Digital Art Book

70010000107132.description:
Get enchanted with the music of Ariana and the Elder Codex in this 18-track Digital Soundtrack!

Tracklist:
・Runes and Reverence
・Archivum Incantationum
・Hidden Path
・Echo in the Silence
・Via Perdita in Silva
・Mist and Flame
・Disenchanted Age
・Frostbound Fade
・Flamma Absentia
・Lux Materna
・Quiet Sanctuary
・Vicus Arx Obscura
・Interludium
・Deadlock
・Stalemate
・Prelude to the Storm
・Storm Breaks
・Ariana
70010000107132.name: Ariana and the Elder Codex Digital Soundtrack

70010000115951.description:
Within these walls, your fate rests in the hands of luck. Overpowered 2 - Crux of Fate is a survival shooter where you’ll have to surround yourself with the most powerful weapons you can find in order to fend off relentless waves of enemy monsters! But as you will soon discover, in this arena your luck increases with each failed attempt, and your determination will ultimately be rewarded!

Enter a dark arena where everything is out to kill you. The action ensues in top-down retro pixel art style where you control a lone human combatant, strategically navigating in every direction and around columns to keep incoming enemy hordes at a safe distance, but still within striking range. Start by selecting a single weapon, then pick up experience drops to level up and improve gear or choose additional armaments. Collect hearts to recover health, gain temporary speed boosts and more! How long can you hang on?

• Run from enemy hordes while keeping them within range of your selected weaponry!
• Pick up experience boosts from fallen foes and level up on the fly.
• Add new weapons to your growing arsenal, each with unique attacks and effects!
• Focus on strategic movement while your weapons automatically strike nearby enemy monsters.
• Survive 20 menacing waves and escape the arena.
• Increase your luck with each failed attempt, gradually creeping towards your goal with determination!
70010000115951.intro: Press your luck to its absolute limits as you fight for survival in a deadly monster arena!
70010000115951.name: Overpowered 2 - Crux of Fate

70050000068172.description:
Conjure the power of the rain with the Rainfall Ring*—an equippable Magic Item that increases your max HP.

*The Rainfall Ring is exclusive DLC for the Deluxe Edition.
70050000068172.name: Ariana and the Elder Codex: Rainfall Ring

70050000068173.description:
Bless your journey with Mothers' Blessing*—an equippable Magic Item that increases the healing amount of recovery magic by 15%.

*Mothers' Blessing is exclusive DLC for the Deluxe Edition.
70050000068173.name: Ariana and the Elder Codex: Mothers' Blessing

70070000033358.description:
Unravel the mysteries hidden within the Library with the Ariana and the Elder Codex Deluxe Bundle!

The Deluxe Bundle includes:
• Digital game
• Digital Art Book (62 pages)
• Digital Soundtrack (18 tracks)
• Ocean Bookmark*
• Rainfall Ring**
• Mothers' Blessing**

*The Ocean Bookmark will only be available as FREE DLC for the first two weeks after the game's launch to purchasers of the Digital Standard Edition or Deluxe Edition.

**The Rainfall Ring and Mothers' Blessing are exclusive DLC for the Deluxe Edition.
70070000033358.name: Ariana and the Elder Codex Deluxe Bundle

70010000076953.description:
A heroine who has lost everything faces tragedy and discovers her way of life in a magical and suspense-filled Otome game.

[Main Cast]
Olivier Paquet (Voiced by Okitsu Kazuyuki)
Emmanuel de Beaumont (voiced by Umehara Yuuichirou)
Melodie (voiced by Suzuki Tatsuhisa)
Ismail (voiced by Yamoto Souma)

[Story]
It is an era shrouded in darkness — the world sealed off, and a deadly plague ravaging the land. A peaceful village is ruthlessly attacked by a knightly order, leaving your home in ruins and your family slain.

Saved by a mysterious figure, you are led to a magical city floating upon the sea. There, the stranger proclaims you to be the Moon Witch, destined to guide the people toward prosperity. But amidst your newfound safety and status, turmoil begins to brew. Friends turn on one another, alliances falter, and blades begin to clash.

You wish to end this tragedy. To take root in this land and live on. Who will you trust...? Who will you choose to face the end with?
70010000076953.name: Volontés

70010000087315.description:
Break blocks, grab powerups, solve puzzles, and beat bosses! When a mysterious tower appears in the forest, Chico the Chipmunk and his new friend Beeatrice decide to go exploring. In the tower they'll find a whole host of block-breaking challenges, clever environmental puzzles, and secrets to be unraveled! How can a tower appear out of nowhere? The answers are waiting inside.

In the block breaking Rebound challenges, you'll be tasked with clearing every block from the stage by bouncing around Chico's trusty giant walnut. Keep a long volley going to get a high score! Chico can change the angle of the ball by tail-whipping it while he runs, to give you control over your shot. It's simple to start but takes skill to master!

Of course, it's not always so simple. There are over a dozen types of blocks, and different power-ups for the walnut that change how they interact. Fire power burns grass blocks, spikes smash through blocks with ease, explosive power breaks stone, and much much more! Fans, cannons, ghosts, and more turn each level into a unique challenge! It's block-breaking like you've never experienced it before.

In between block breaking challenges you'll explore the mysterious Celestial Tower, a large interconnected dungeon full of environmental puzzles! Explore all 6 floors of the tower, unlock new paths, and make your way to the very top! You'll meet a cast of characters who need your help, as they try to complete their secret mission. Can you solve the puzzles, uncover the truth of the Celestial Tower, and save the day?

Have fun and show off your unique style! Save up the sunflower seeds you collect, and you can trade them in for special designs for both your walnut and the game's interface! Why not bounce around a watermelon or a paper lantern instead of a walnut? There are a bunch of colors and styles to choose from.
70010000087315.intro: Master skill-based block breaking challenges, solve environmental puzzles, and explore the mysterious tower with Chico the Chipmunk!
70010000087315.name: Chico's Rebound

70010000097680.description:
Home to magical creatures and plants, the fabled Grimoire Groves should’ve been a haven for witches looking for a new home. But by the time they arrive, the forest spirits have disappeared and only a few plant creatures remain. But not all is lost. With a little hard work, investigation and magic, the witches might just restore the Grimoire Groves to the lush forest it once was!

Master Witch Magic
Unlock and learn new spells to complete your grimoire. Mix and match different spells to find your own brand of magic and master the balance between all four elements. 

Grow, Forage and Craft
Discover all that the groves have to offer! Collect fruits, craft new spells and items and grow plant creatures to repopulate the forest. Honor the witch tradition of foraging and learn to enhance your powers.

Befriend Mythical Creatures
Find the fabled forest spirits and give them a new home. Help them restore the balance of the groves by boosting their magical powers, as well as your own, with decorations around your cottage. 

Unravel the Mystery of the Rainbow Socks
Embark on a journey to recover the most mythical item to ever exist – the fabled Rainbow Socks – as you investigate what disturbed the careful balance of the magical forest.
70010000097680.intro: Join the witches in their quest to restore the Grimoire Groves! Master magic, grow cute plant creatures and discover the mystery of the Rainbow Socks.
70010000097680.name: Grimoire Groves

70010000100669.description:
In this hybrid strategy roguelite deck builder, you must protect your hero from hordes of enemies in a grid-based combat system. Prepare to fend off attacks from all directions as you remain stationary at the centre of the battlefield. Use your action cards wisely, strategically combining energy, cards, effects, and knowledge of your enemies to overcome the odds.

Stand Your Ground
What do you get when an unstoppable force meets an unmovable object? Chaos, and lots of it. With 100+ different cards, items and weapons with unique effect combinations, you’ll craft the ultimate stalwart against the forces of corruption. Build deck synergies and choose key skills upgrades as you set out to save the world. 

Dust Yourself Off
Decide your character’s journey. Trade with merchants, be faced with moral decisions along the way, and shape your hero’s adventure. Unlock unique hero backgrounds that alter your starting deck and can impact the strategy of your run each time you play. 

Brave A New World
The world, divided into eight elemental regions, will permanently react to the multitude of choices you make. Each time you play, experience completely unique runs within an overarching story, with over 100 enemies, 9 bosses, different starting decks and 25 arenas to discover.
70010000100669.intro: Journey to the Void places you at the edge of a corrupted world. It’s up to you to venture toward the centre and uncover the mystery at the heart of it all.
70010000100669.name: Journey to the Void

70010000106779.description:
Primal Planet is a solo developed metroidvania that combines survival and crafting elements with a pixel-perfect aesthetic and an action-packed story, and it's all taking place on a lush planet filled with dinosaurs.

Uncover the Story
Embark on a thrilling journey as you follow the gripping tale of a cave dweller fighting to protect his family. Survive a brutal T-Rex attack and uncover a narrative blending the wild with intriguing sci-fi twists. Forge unexpected alliances as you unravel the truth behind an alien presence.

Adapt and Survive
Survival in the wilderness demands cunning. Use natural resources to craft vital tools, weapons, and mixtures for healing and protection. Gain experience and upgrade your skills to overcome the countless dangers of a primal planet.

Explore the Primeval
Discover diverse biomes, each with unique challenges and secrets. Traverse dense forests, sprawling plains, treacherous mountains, and mysterious ocean depths where danger awaits. Encounter a vast array of dinosaurs, from the majestic Apatosaurus to the terrifying Carnotaurus, each perfectly adapted to its habitat.

Fight and Be Clever
Experience gameplay blending combat and strategy. Adapt to face ancient beasts and aliens alike. Tailor tactics, use crafted weapons, bait, traps, and stealth to master encounters with regular and boss enemies. Every confrontation tests your skill and cunning.

Play Local Co-op
Team up with a friend in local co-op where player 2 can jump in at any time as Sino the nimble sinosauropteryx, your faithful companion. Work together to overcome obstacles, solve puzzles, and battle foes as your bond strengthens, skills increase and Sino grows up to become a fierce and loyal friend.

In Primal Planet, your journey from a humble cave dweller to the planet's last hope is filled with danger, wonder, and the unbreakable bonds of family. Are you ready to rise to the challenge?
70010000106779.intro: Unveil a heartfelt story of family, dinosaurs, and UFOs! Craft, upgrade, and survive in a realm of primeval predators, alone or in co-op. Welcome to the Dinovania!
70010000106779.name: Primal Planet

70010000107028.description:
In Mystic Explorer, you are no longer bound by a single blade! Through our unique "Multi-Weapon System," you can command an entire arsenal simultaneously—from devastating melee strikes to barrages of missiles. Experience explosive combat as you lead your hunter squad through shifting mystic realms to defeat the ultimate Demon King!

【Vast Arsenal, Infinite Builds】
Choose from a massive selection of weaponry: Basic, Melee, AOE, Missiles, and Projectiles! Weapons are categorized by Physical and Magic attributes and further divided into specialized schools like Savage, Blood, and Lightning. Mix and match diverse weapon types to forge your own legendary combat style!

【Weapon Evolution & Synergies】
Every weapon holds infinite potential. Spend upgrade points to unlock powerful "Weapon Effects"—the heart of any great Build. Some effects trigger devastating cross-weapon Synergies, while others stack your stats to insane levels.
Example: Unlock the "Savage Hammer" effect to convert your Max HP into massive damage and increased attack range!

【Exclusive Skills & Limit Breaks】
Unleash game-changing skills as your total weapon level rises:
Weapon Enhancements: Maximizes lethality for specific weapon categories.
Attribute Growth: Your stats grow endlessly as the battle rages on.
Stat Conversion: Transform one attribute into another powerful buff to double your combat power!

【Loot, Survive, and Conquer】
Fate Chests lie scattered across battlefields swarming with monsters. The rarer the chest, the longer it takes to open—a true gamble of risk vs. reward! Snatch divine gear from the jaws of death; only the hunter who survives to the end can claim the ultimate legendary treasure.

【Classes & Allies: Build the Ultimate Squad】
Unlock diverse classes with distinct skills. Recruit powerful allies in the mystic realms to fight by your side. Utilize diverse team compositions to crush formidable BOSSES and finally bring down the Great Demon King!
70010000107028.intro: Addictive God-tier Rogue-like! Master infinite weapon synergies, crush the relentless horde, and claim the ultimate treasure. Craft your unique build and survive the mystic trial!
70010000107028.name: Mystic Explorer

70010000110285.description:
Neopets™: The Mega Mini Games Collection is a lovingly remastered collection of 26 fan-favourite mini-games from the golden age of Neopets! From collecting Doughnutfruits in Hasee Bounce, launching Kass in Kass Basher, or chasing Neggs in Meerca Chase, the magic of Neopets is back!

And introducing an all-new adventure: Starlight Symphony, starring Nyx in a dazzling musical quest through the stars!

26 Classic Games, Remastered
Enjoy a curated library of Neopia’s most beloved web games, now optimised for controllers, widescreen displays, and silky-smooth 60 FPS gameplay.

Play Your Way
Choose from Arcade, Challenge, or Endless mode

Unlockable Goodies
Earn trophies, stickers, and Pet-themed rewards as you play and master each game

From the Haunted Woods to Faerieland, each and every pixel, song, and piece of art has been restored with care, welcoming back returning fans and inviting new ones into the whimsical world of Neopia.

Reconnect/Connect With Your Inner Neopian
Whether you're returning to Neopia or discovering it for the first time, this collection is your ticket to the colourful, quirky universe that inspired a generation.

So dust off your Slorg Blaster, grab your favourite pet, and get ready, you’ve got a world to explore!
70010000110285.intro: Journey back to Neopia with 26 classic games, brought back to life for new and returning fans!
70010000110285.name: Neopets - Mega Mini Games Collection - The Neopian Arcade Odyssey

70010000110529.description:
An exciting new style of action adventure fusing shooting action with exploration.

■A new take on shooting action and in-depth exploration
Experience a new type of action adventure, featuring a fusion between exploration within an expansive world and highly technical twin-stick shooting. At your home base, power up the demon king Damon and make purchases. During the exploration phase, defeat enemies to complete each area. The story progresses as you alternate between the two phases.

■Strategic battles with a vast arsenal of weapons and gimmicks
The battle mechanics include both close-ranged attacks with handguns as well as long-ranged attacks with machine guns and more.
You can find more powerful weapons as you explore. 
During the boss battles awaiting within each stage, a strategic approach making use of the area gimmicks will prove crucial.

■Customization and Outfit Changes
Damon grows throughout the adventure, learning to master various weapons and skills. You can customize your set of skills to match your play style. You can even choose from a variety of outfit options to change Damon's appearance.

■Journey together with two player co-op
Take control of Damon's canine companion to help him in combat in various ways, such as collecting items.
*Only available via local (offline) play
70010000110529.intro: An unlikely pair, an unforgettable journey
70010000110529.name: DAMON and BABY

70010000111055.description:
Welcome to Kayu, where every citizen, both man and woman, young and old alike, enjoy martial arts.

Living in that kingdom as a Daoist priestess in training, you made your way to the Tournament of Valor to root for your childhood friend.

A sudden attack during the Tournament of Valor forces you to protect your country and those you care about.

Fight alongside friend and foe alike to save your kingdom!
70010000111055.name: Otome Daoshi -Fighting For Love-

70010000112036.description:
Homicipher, the language-deciphering x exploration adventure game in which you try to escape by deciphering the words of horror men, is coming!

■Synopsis
The protagonist, having wandered into the Otherworld, must learn the words of the horror men who dwell there while searching for a way to escape...

■Nintendo Switch™ Version Features
◎New illustrations added!
Includes several newly-drawn event CG's by Yatsunagi.
◎Fully-Realized System
Optimized with intuitive controls for text input and point-and-click, ensuring a smooth and comfortable gameplay experience.
◎Supported Languages: Japanese, English, Traditional and Simplified Chinese
70010000112036.intro:
Decipher the words of the horror men and aim for escape
Decipher words ・Escape from horror ・ADV
70010000112036.name: Homicipher

70010000112515.description:
The Knights of the Cross is an RPG card game adapted from The Knights of the Cross by Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz. You will play as the knight Zbyszko and embark on a medieval adventure. Recruit companions, build your deck, and help the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth battle the Teutonic Order in the epic Battle of Grunwald.

【Recruit Allies, Join the Fight】
Recruit over 30 unique companions, each with their own storyline. Completing their storyline unlock exclusive items.
Each character is equipped with dynamic portraits and stunning ultimate abilities and effects, offering a rich visual experience.

【Unique Synergy, Build Your Strategy】
The innovative Teambuilding Combo System: The cards you play will dictate your allies' actions in the turn.
Combine cards and relics with your teammates' abilities to create powerful combat strategies like burn, bleed, poison, and more—offering fresh experiences on each playthrough.
Bosses come with their own special mechanics, such as cleansing their debuffs or limiting card types. Adapt your deck and tactics to break through tough encounters and feel the thrill of victory.

【Engaging Story, Immersive World】
A branching main story with multiple endings, allowing you to change the fate of the original characters.
Over a hundred side quests and random events that immerse you in medieval festivals, folk traditions, and daily life.
70010000112515.name: The Knights of the Cross

70010000112630.description:
Embark on an epic adventure in Aarik And The Ruined Kingdom, a relaxing and family-friendly perspective puzzle game that blends heart warming storytelling with mind-bending challenges. 

Join Aarik as he journeys through enchanted castles, mystical forests, vast deserts, eerie swamps, and frozen tundra, all while solving intricate puzzles to reunite his family. Harness the power of your father’s magical crown, equipped with four enchanted gemstones, to reshape the world around you. 

Fix crumbling bridges, mend broken paths, make new allies, and even reverse time itself! Dive into a world full of unique levels and devious puzzles in this captivating quest to find Aarik’s mother and restore hope to a broken land.
70010000112630.intro: Use the King's magic crown to solve perspective puzzles and fix the broken kingdom!
70010000112630.name: Aarik And The Ruined Kingdom

70010000116177.description:
Cards Lie is a single-player social deduction experience inspired by timeless games of bluff and betrayal — reimagined in a gothic, Burton-esque world. Each card represents a villager or a demon. Flip, listen, and judge who tells the truth… or who’s leading you straight to hell.

Features

• • 75 beautifully hand made illustrated cards — villagers, demons, and mysterious clues.


• • Procedural scenarios — no two rituals are the same.

• • Lies that evolve — demons adapt their deceit every round.

• • Stylized art direction — gothic charm inspired by Tim Burton and medieval engravings.

• • Atmospheric soundtrack — haunting choirs and dark ambient tones.

• • Easy to learn, hard to master — uncover patterns, analyze logic, and trust your instincts.



Gameplay Loop

1. → Gather your village.

2. → Flip a card and reveal a phrase — truth or lie.

3. → Use logic and intuition to eliminate the demons.

4. → One mistake… and the village falls to darkness.

“Not every smile is innocent.”

Will you see through the lies?
70010000116177.intro: Unmask the demons. Trust no one. You’ve gathered the entire village for a midnight ritual. Among them hide creatures of pure evil — demons disguised as villagers.
70010000116177.name: Cards lie

70010000117610.description:
"99% sweetness × 1% surprise"!?
"Hey, do you know the meaning of the four-leaf clover?"
A fully-voiced, youthful yuri visual novel you'll fall in love with at first sight is coming to Nintendo Switch™!

【Synopsis】
The wheels of fate begin to turn.
The girls meet, fall in love, and deepen their bonds.
"Hey, do you know the meaning of the four-leaf clover?"
Set at "Shonan Saika Academy," a prestigious school in Shonan, Kanagawa Prefecture, this is a youthful story of girls wavering between friendship and love.
Shonan Saika Academy, a high-achieving all-girls school in Kanagawa Prefecture.

One day, Marin Tachibana, along with her best friends Mashiro Saotome and Kiyoka Jinguji, experiences a special day.
It begins with meeting an unusual new transfer student, Shizuku Kujyo.
A beautiful girl with a calm and dignified demeanor.
Meeting her feels like déjà vu...
While showing her around the school, they stop by an observation deck, where Marin finds a four-leaf clover.
There is a tradition at this school:
If you press a four-leaf clover found on the observation deck into your student notebook, your wish will come true.
(I want to get closer to her. To spend more time with her...)
With this wish, Marin gives Shizuku the "coincidental" four-leaf clover she found.
This act becomes a turning point, bringing Marin and Shizuku closer together with the help of Mashiro and Kiyoka. However...
"Please, stop worrying about me. I don't want to just be protected..."
"Shizuku, we're friends, right?"
A storm threatens to tear them apart.
It is deeply tied to a "secret" Shizuku is hiding and a "trauma" from Marin's past.
The story follows the growth, mutual support, and cherished memories of the four girls.
Will Marin and the others find their personal "clover" (happiness)?

【Localization】
In addition to Japanese, supports English and Chinese (Traditional and Simplified)!

【Main Character】
Gentle and healing girl-----Marin Tachibana (立花 茉鈴)
CV: Saho Shirasuna

Cool and beautiful girl-----Shizuku Kujyo (九条 しずく)
CV: Yuki Takada

Bright and cheerful mood-maker-----Mashiro Saotome (早乙女 真白)
CV: Yuki Kuwahara

Caring older-sister type-----Kiyoka Jinguji (神宮寺 清香)
CV: Noriko Shibasaki

【Special】
Dynamic Character Expressions System.
Express characters' emotions in greater variety!
Enhance immersion!

【Theme Song】
"Clover Reset"
Music, Lyrics, Arrangement: Shoichiro Toko
Vocals: Saho Shirasuna (as Marin Tachibana)
70010000117610.intro: A yuri novel game that you'll fall in love with at first sight. this is a youthful story of girls wavering between friendship and love.
70010000117610.name: Clover Reset

70050000069069.description: Digital content pack that includes the digital soundtrack and digital artworks for DAMON and BABY.
70050000069069.name: DAMON and BABY Deluxe Contents

70050000069174.description:
Lots of multiplayer fun awaits in this area of Bellabel Park! Visit the Local Multiplayer Plaza for enjoy 17 different co-operative and competitive attractions, where up to four people can play together – even via GameShare!

Alternatively, you can head to the Game Room Plaza and play with friends and family either online or via local wireless. Six different attractions await here, allowing up to 12 players to work together or compete for first place!

Super Mario Bros. Wonder for Nintendo Switch required to use this upgrade pack, sold separately.
70050000069174.name: Super Mario Bros. Wonder – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park Upgrade Pack

70070000033435.description:
■Deluxe Edition Contents
- Main game
- Digital Artworks & Digital Soundtrack

"DAMON and BABY" is also available in the standard edition. Please be careful not to purchase more than one copy.
"Digital Artworks & Digital Soundtrack" is separate applications from the main game.


An exciting new style of action adventure fusing shooting action with exploration.

■A new take on shooting action and in-depth exploration
Experience a new type of action adventure, featuring a fusion between exploration within an expansive world and highly technical twin-stick shooting. At your home base, power up the demon king Damon and make purchases. During the exploration phase, defeat enemies to complete each area. The story progresses as you alternate between the two phases.

■Strategic battles with a vast arsenal of weapons and gimmicks
The battle mechanics include both close-ranged attacks with handguns as well as long-ranged attacks with machine guns and more.
You can find more powerful weapons as you explore. 
During the boss battles awaiting within each stage, a strategic approach making use of the area gimmicks will prove crucial.

■Customization and Outfit Changes
Damon grows throughout the adventure, learning to master various weapons and skills. You can customize your set of skills to match your play style. You can even choose from a variety of outfit options to change Damon's appearance.

■Journey together with two player co-op
Take control of Damon's canine companion to help him in combat in various ways, such as collecting items.
*Only available via local (offline) play
70070000033435.intro: An unlikely pair, an unforgettable journey
70070000033435.name: DAMON and BABY Deluxe Edition

70010000104079.description:
The Mega Man Star Force series, which expanded into an anime, is back in the Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection with all seven games and additional features like a gallery of illustrations and music! Upgraded from the original version, online play is also supported!

It is the year 220X, and the world has seen rapid advancements in Wave technology. Our protagonist, 11-year-old Geo Stelar, refuses to go to school as he mourns the disappearance of his astronaut father.
One night, Geo is at the observatory gazing at stars as he usually does. Suddenly, his Transer picks up a signal from space and he is hit with a powerful electric shock!
When he finally comes to, an alien with an electromagnetic wave body called Omega-Xis is standing over him...

Mega Man Star Force Pegasus
Mega Man Star Force Leo
Mega Man Star Force Dragon
Mega Man Star Force 2 Zerker x Ninja
Mega Man Star Force 2 Zerker x Saurian
Mega Man Star Force 3 Black Ace
Mega Man Star Force 3 Red Joker

Note: The toy link features found in the original versions are not supported.
70010000104079.intro: The Star Force games make a stellar comeback in a new Legacy Collection!
70010000104079.name: Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection

70050000064763.description:
This product contains a portion of the content from the full Character Model Pack that is compatible with Mega Man Star Force Collection.

Character models for Geo Stelar and Omega-Xis can be selected on the Main Menu. 

Note: Additional character models cannot be used in gameplay.

Also adds special arrangements for four music tracks to the Music Player:
Loneliness – Summer Shade Version
Astro Wave – Brilliant Expanse Version
Anthem of the Solitary – Howling Void Version
Cheerful Indoors – School Days Version
70050000064763.name: Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection – Geo Stelar and Omega-Xis Character Model Pack

70010000106031.description:
About Homura: The Crimson Warriors
Fourteen years have passed since the Battle of Sekigahara split Japan in two.

Now firmly in control, the Tokugawa shogunate is scheming to eliminate the Toyotomi clan, a long-standing thorn in its side.

In response, the Toyotomi clan has decided to confront the Tokugawa head-on, using Osaka Castle as their stronghold. Calls for support were sent to daimyo throughout the nation and a mere few answered the call. One of these brave warriors was Nobushige Sanada, the second son of the Sanada family who was cast away to Mt. Kudo on house arrest after the Battle of Sekigahara.

Alongside Nobushige on his escape from Mt. Kudo are the Sanada Ten Braves, ten ninjas who serve him even after their exile. Standing in their way are the Ura Yagyu, a group comprised of assassins who have carried out many killings under orders from the shogunate, mysterious swordsmen, and mighty warriors.

This is the final chapter of the Warring States period. It is a tale of the bonds and way of life shared by the Nobushige Sanada and the Ten Braves who gather at Osaka Castle.

Key Features
Amongst the fire and ashes, love will prevail — Previously released in Japan in 2018, Western fans can experience the historical fantasy otome as the protagonist Mutsumi Mochizuki fights alongside the Crimson Warriors. Accompanied with multiple endings and CGs, this legendary battle of love tangled with iconic historical events and original characters in the Warring States period is sure to capture the hearts of history otome lovers!

Maintain peak performance with Energy Reading — Use Energy Reading to detect the affection level and Ring status of love interests. Mutsumi has the special ability to adjust the love interests' Rings. When sped up, it allows them to utilize unique powers at the cost of their physical health. Make sure to keep their Rings balanced! If their health deteriorates too much, the consequences could be dire…

Ninja Guidance — Use your ninja scrolls to keep track of where you are in the story and revisit moments of the past if you seek a different outcome of the path you've chosen. Adjust both your affection and ring levels with each warrior when you select previously viewed events to change the course of history!

Path of the Samurai — Throughout the story, you can level up your ninja rank to keep up with the Crimson Warriors during battle. Take your ninja skills to the next level and make it your mission to reach Master rank and ensure victory against the Ura Yagyu!
70010000106031.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70010000106031.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors

70010000106032.description: The Digital Short Stories include five stories—one for each love interest. In 20 pages, find out what happens outside of the battlefield and how fiery things can get!
70010000106032.intro: Ignite the fire within the Crimson Warriors' hearts in their final showdown!
70010000106032.name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors Digital Short Stories

70010000106033.description:
Sometimes, you need a break from the battlefield (and romance). Listen to the Digital Soundtrack to help soothe your soul and tug at your heartstrings!

Tracklist (26 Tracks):
Composition: Yuki Sugiura (STUDIO EDEN INC.)

1. Turmoil
2. Daylight

4. Secret Meeting
